  %ext7 = extractvalue %evid.yield.map_require_nonempty$Text$Int %invoke6, 0
  %ext8 = extractvalue %evid.yield.map_require_nonempty$Text$Int %invoke6, 2
  %unpack.slot9 = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } %ext8, ptr %unpack.slot9
  %unpack10 = load { ptr, i64 }, ptr %unpack.slot9
  %unpack.slot11 = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } %ext8, ptr %unpack.slot11
  %unpack12 = load %evid.type.MapCardinalityFailure, ptr %unpack.slot11
  switch i8 %ext7, label %bb.trap.2 [
    i8 0, label %bb.invoke.ok.0
    i8 1, label %bb.invoke.fail.1
  ]

bb1:
  %load13 = load { ptr, i64 }, ptr %slot3
  store { ptr, i64 } %load13, ptr %slot6
  %load14 = load { ptr, i64 }, ptr %slot6
  %call15 = call %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ @evid$nonempty_map_first_entry_copy$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %load14)
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %call15, ptr %slot7
  %load16 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %slot7
  %ext17 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %load16, 1
  store i64 %ext17, ptr %slot0
  br label %bb3

bb2:

  %ext19 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapCardinalityFailure %load18, 0
  switch i32 %ext19, label %bb.trap.3 [
    i32 0, label %bb4
  ]

bb3:
  %load20 = load i64, ptr %slot0
  ret i64 %load20

bb4:

  %ext22 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapFirstEntryAndRest_Text__Int_ %load21, 0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %ext22, ptr %slot8

  store { ptr, i64 } %call0, ptr %slot4

  %call2 = call { ptr, i64 } @evid$test$widened_int_map({ ptr, i64 } %load1)

  %unpack10 = load %evid.type.MapBindingFailure, ptr %unpack.slot9
  switch i8 %ext5, label %bb.trap.2 [
    i8 0, label %bb.invoke.ok.0
    i8 1, label %bb.invoke.fail.1
  ]

  store { ptr, i64 } %load11, ptr %slot5
  %load12 = load { ptr, i64 }, ptr %slot5
  %call13 = call %evid.type.MapEntry_Int__Int_ @evid$nonempty_map_first_entry_copy$Int$Int({ ptr, i64 } %load12)

  br label %bb3

bb2:
  %load16 = load %evid.type.MapBindingFailure, ptr %slot2
  %ext17 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapBindingFailure %load16, 0
  switch i32 %ext17, label %bb.trap.3 [
    i32 2, label %bb4
    i32 3, label %bb5
  ]

bb3:
  %load18 = load i64, ptr %slot0
  ret i64 %load18

bb4:
  store i64 3, ptr %slot0
  br label %bb3

bb5:
  store i64 5, ptr %slot0
  br label %bb3

bb.invoke.ok.0:
  store { ptr, i64 } %unpack8, ptr %slot1
  br label %bb1

bb.invoke.fail.1:
  store %evid.type.MapBindingFailure %unpack10, ptr %slot2
  br label %bb2

  unreachable

bb.trap.3:
  unreachable

}

  switch i8 %ext14, label %bb.trap.5 [
    i8 0, label %bb.invoke.ok.3

  br label %bb5

  ret i64 %load19

define i64 @evid$test$merge_empty_maps_value() {
entry:

  %slot4 = alloca { ptr, i64 }

  %ext6 = extractvalue %evid.yield.map_merge_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %invoke4, 2
  %unpack.slot7 = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } %ext6, ptr %unpack.slot7
  %unpack8 = load { ptr, i64 }, ptr %unpack.slot7
  %unpack.slot9 = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } %ext6, ptr %unpack.slot9
  %unpack10 = load %evid.type.MapMergeFailure, ptr %unpack.slot9
  switch i8 %ext5, label %bb.trap.2 [
    i8 0, label %bb.invoke.ok.0
    i8 1, label %bb.invoke.fail.1

  %load11 = load { ptr, i64 }, ptr %slot1
  store { ptr, i64 } %load11, ptr %slot5
  store i64 7, ptr %slot0
  br label %bb3

bb2:
  %load12 = load %evid.type.MapMergeFailure, ptr %slot2
  %ext13 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapMergeFailure %load12, 0
  switch i32 %ext13, label %bb.trap.3 [
    i32 4, label %bb4
  ]

bb3:
  %load14 = load i64, ptr %slot0
  ret i64 %load14

bb4:
  store i64 9, ptr %slot0
  br label %bb3

bb.invoke.ok.0:
  store { ptr, i64 } %unpack8, ptr %slot1
  br label %bb1

bb.invoke.fail.1:
  store %evid.type.MapMergeFailure %unpack10, ptr %slot2
  br label %bb2

bb.trap.2:
  unreachable

bb.trap.3:
  unreachable

}

  %load4 = load { ptr, i64 }, ptr %slot2
  %load5 = load { ptr, i64 }, ptr %slot3
  %call6 = call { ptr, i64 } @evid$map_merge_left_nonempty_using_left_bindings_for_shared_keys$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %load4, { ptr, i64 } %load5)
  store { ptr, i64 } %call6, ptr %slot1
  %load7 = load { ptr, i64 }, ptr %slot1
  %strptr8 = getelementptr inbounds [4 x i8], ptr @evid.str.0, i64 0, i64 0
  %ins9 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %strptr8, 0
  %ins10 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %ins9, i64 3, 1
  %invoke11 = call %evid.yield.nonempty_map_lookup_copy$Text$Int @evid$nonempty_map_lookup_copy$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %load7, { ptr, i64 } %ins10)
  %ext12 = extractvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_lookup_copy$Text$Int %invoke11, 0
  %ext13 = extractvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_lookup_copy$Text$Int %invoke11, 2
  %unpack.slot14 = alloca i64
  store i64 %ext13, ptr %unpack.slot14
  %unpack15 = load %evid.type.MapBindingFailure, ptr %unpack.slot14
  switch i8 %ext12, label %bb.trap.2 [
    i8 0, label %bb.invoke.ok.0
    i8 1, label %bb.invoke.fail.1
  ]

bb1:
  %load16 = load i64, ptr %slot5
  store i64 %load16, ptr %slot7
  %load17 = load i64, ptr %slot7
  store i64 %load17, ptr %slot0
  br label %bb3

  %ext19 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapBindingFailure %load18, 0

    i32 3, label %bb5

  ret i64 %load20

  br label %bb3

  br label %bb3

  store i64 3, ptr %slot0
  br label %bb3

bb5:
  store i64 3, ptr %slot0
  br label %bb3

  store i64 %ext12, ptr %slot6
  br label %bb1

bb.invoke.fail.1:
  store %evid.type.MapBindingFailure %unpack14, ptr %slot7
  br label %bb2

  unreachable

bb.trap.3:
  unreachable

}

  store { ptr, i64 } %call3, ptr %slot4
  %load4 = load { ptr, i64 }, ptr %slot4
  %call5 = call { ptr, i64 } @evid$nonempty_map_entries_copy$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %load4)

  %ext45 = extractvalue %evid.type.ListFirstAndRest_Int_ %load44, 1
  store { ptr, i64 } %ext45, ptr %slot24
  %load46 = load { ptr, i64 }, ptr %slot24
  %invoke47 = call %evid.yield.list_require_nonempty$Int @evid$list_require_nonempty$Int({ ptr, i64 } %load46)
  %ext48 = extractvalue %evid.yield.list_require_nonempty$Int %invoke47, 0
  %ext49 = extractvalue %evid.yield.list_require_nonempty$Int %invoke47, 2
  %unpack.slot50 = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } %ext49, ptr %unpack.slot50
  %unpack51 = load { ptr, i64 }, ptr %unpack.slot50
  %unpack.slot52 = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } %ext49, ptr %unpack.slot52
  %unpack53 = load %evid.type.ListCardinalityFailure, ptr %unpack.slot52
  switch i8 %ext48, label %bb.trap.6 [
    i8 0, label %bb.invoke.ok.4
    i8 1, label %bb.invoke.fail.5
  ]

bb4:
  %call54 = call { ptr, i64 } @evid$test$single_list()
  store { ptr, i64 } %call54, ptr %slot17
  br label %bb3

bb5:
  %load55 = load { ptr, i64 }, ptr %slot22
  store { ptr, i64 } %load55, ptr %slot25
  %load56 = load { ptr, i64 }, ptr %slot25
  %call57 = call i64 @evid$test$first_value({ ptr, i64 } %load56)
  store i64 %call57, ptr %slot0
  br label %bb7

bb6:
  %load58 = load %evid.type.ListCardinalityFailure, ptr %slot23
  %ext59 = extractvalue %evid.type.ListCardinalityFailure %load58, 0
  switch i32 %ext59, label %bb.trap.7 [
    i32 1, label %bb8
  ]

bb7:
  %load60 = load i64, ptr %slot0
  ret i64 %load60

bb8:
  %load61 = load i64, ptr %slot12
  store i64 %load61, ptr %slot0
  br label %bb7

bb.invoke.ok.0:
  store { ptr, i64 } %unpack35, ptr %slot18
  br label %bb1

bb.invoke.fail.1:
  store %evid.type.ListCardinalityFailure %unpack37, ptr %slot19
  br label %bb2

bb.trap.2:
  unreachable

bb.trap.3:
  unreachable

bb.invoke.ok.4:
  store { ptr, i64 } %unpack51, ptr %slot22
  br label %bb5

bb.invoke.fail.5:
  store %evid.type.ListCardinalityFailure %unpack53, ptr %slot23
  br label %bb6

bb.trap.6:
  unreachable

bb.trap.7:
  unreachable

}

  %slot52 = alloca i64
  br label %bb0

  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 1, 1
  ret { ptr, i64 } %carrier1
}

define { ptr, i64 } @evid$list_prepend$Int(i64 %arg0, { ptr, i64 } %arg1) {
entry:
  %old_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %old_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 1
  %new_count0 = add i64 %old_count0, 1
  %copy_bytes0 = mul i64 %old_count0, 8
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %new_count0, 8
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  store i64 %arg0, ptr %data0
  %tail0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 8
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %tail0, ptr %old_data0, i64 %copy_bytes0, i1 false)
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %new_count0, 1
  ret { ptr, i64 } %carrier1
}

define { ptr, i64 } @evid$list_append$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0, i64 %arg1) {

  %old_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1

  %copy_bytes0 = mul i64 %old_count0, 8
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %new_count0, 8
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %data0, ptr %old_data0, i64 %copy_bytes0, i1 false)
  %tail0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %copy_bytes0
  store i64 %arg1, ptr %tail0
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %new_count0, 1
  ret { ptr, i64 } %carrier1
}

define %evid.yield.map_require_nonempty$Text$Int @evid$map_require_nonempty$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0) {
entry:
  %count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %is_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %count0, 0
  br i1 %is_empty0, label %empty, label %nonempty

nonempty:
  %ok.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_require_nonempty$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 0, 0
  %ok.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  store { ptr, i64 } %arg0, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_require_nonempty$Text$Int %ok.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %ok.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.map_require_nonempty$Text$Int %ok.value

empty:
  %reason0 = insertvalue %evid.type.MapCardinalityFailure zeroinitializer, i32 0, 0
  %fail.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_require_nonempty$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 1, 0
  %fail.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  store %evid.type.MapCardinalityFailure %reason0, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_require_nonempty$Text$Int %fail.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %fail.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.map_require_nonempty$Text$Int %fail.value
}

define %evid.type.MapFirstEntryAndRest_Text__Int_ @evid$nonempty_map_consume_first_entry$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0) {
entry:

  %count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %data0
  %rest_count0 = sub i64 %count0, 1
  %rest_data0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 24
  %rest0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %rest_data0, 0
  %rest1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %rest0, i64 %rest_count0, 1

  ret %evid.type.MapFirstEntryAndRest_Text__Int_ %result1

define %evid.yield.map_lookup_copy$Text$Int @evid$map_lookup_copy$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0, { ptr, i64 } %arg1) {
entry:
  %data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  br label %scan

scan:
  %index0 = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %next0, %not_match ]
  %at_end0 = icmp eq i64 %index0, %count0
  br i1 %at_end0, label %missing, label %probe

probe:
  %offset0 = mul i64 %index0, 24
  %entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %offset0
  %entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %entry_ptr0
  %candidate_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %entry0, 0
  %candidate_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %candidate_key0, 0
  %candidate_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %candidate_key0, 1
  %lookup_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %lookup_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 1
  %key_size_equal0 = icmp eq i64 %candidate_count0, %lookup_count0
  br i1 %key_size_equal0, label %key_bytes_compare, label %not_match

key_bytes_compare:
  %key_cmp0 = call i32 @memcmp(ptr %candidate_data0, ptr %lookup_data0, i64 %candidate_count0)
  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %found, label %not_match

not_match:
  %next0 = add i64 %index0, 1
  br label %scan

found:
  %value0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %entry0, 1
  %ok.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_lookup_copy$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 0, 0
  %ok.pack.slot = alloca i64
  store i64 zeroinitializer, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  store i64 %value0, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.pack = load i64, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_lookup_copy$Text$Int %ok.tag, i64 %ok.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.map_lookup_copy$Text$Int %ok.value

missing:
  %reason0 = insertvalue %evid.type.MapBindingFailure zeroinitializer, i32 2, 0
  %fail.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_lookup_copy$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 1, 0
  %fail.pack.slot = alloca i64
  store i64 zeroinitializer, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  store %evid.type.MapBindingFailure %reason0, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.pack = load i64, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_lookup_copy$Text$Int %fail.tag, i64 %fail.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.map_lookup_copy$Text$Int %fail.value
}

define %evid.yield.nonempty_map_lookup_copy$Text$Int @evid$nonempty_map_lookup_copy$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0, { ptr, i64 } %arg1) {
entry:
  %data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  br label %scan

scan:
  %index0 = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %next0, %not_match ]
  %at_end0 = icmp eq i64 %index0, %count0
  br i1 %at_end0, label %missing, label %probe

probe:
  %offset0 = mul i64 %index0, 24
  %entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %offset0
  %entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %entry_ptr0
  %candidate_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %entry0, 0
  %candidate_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %candidate_key0, 0
  %candidate_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %candidate_key0, 1
  %lookup_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %lookup_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 1
  %key_size_equal0 = icmp eq i64 %candidate_count0, %lookup_count0
  br i1 %key_size_equal0, label %key_bytes_compare, label %not_match

key_bytes_compare:
  %key_cmp0 = call i32 @memcmp(ptr %candidate_data0, ptr %lookup_data0, i64 %candidate_count0)
  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %found, label %not_match

not_match:
  %next0 = add i64 %index0, 1
  br label %scan

found:
  %value0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %entry0, 1
  %ok.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_lookup_copy$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 0, 0
  %ok.pack.slot = alloca i64
  store i64 zeroinitializer, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  store i64 %value0, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.pack = load i64, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_lookup_copy$Text$Int %ok.tag, i64 %ok.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.nonempty_map_lookup_copy$Text$Int %ok.value

missing:
  %reason0 = insertvalue %evid.type.MapBindingFailure zeroinitializer, i32 2, 0
  %fail.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_lookup_copy$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 1, 0
  %fail.pack.slot = alloca i64
  store i64 zeroinitializer, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  store %evid.type.MapBindingFailure %reason0, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.pack = load i64, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_lookup_copy$Text$Int %fail.tag, i64 %fail.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.nonempty_map_lookup_copy$Text$Int %fail.value
}

define %evid.yield.map_lookup_copy$Int$Int @evid$map_lookup_copy$Int$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0, i64 %arg1) {
entry:
  %data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  br label %scan

scan:
  %index0 = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %next0, %not_match ]
  %at_end0 = icmp eq i64 %index0, %count0
  br i1 %at_end0, label %missing, label %probe

probe:
  %offset0 = mul i64 %index0, 16
  %entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %offset0
  %entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Int__Int_, ptr %entry_ptr0
  %candidate_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Int__Int_ %entry0, 0
  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i64 %candidate_key0, %arg1
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %found, label %not_match

not_match:
  %next0 = add i64 %index0, 1
  br label %scan

found:
  %value0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Int__Int_ %entry0, 1
  %ok.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_lookup_copy$Int$Int zeroinitializer, i8 0, 0
  %ok.pack.slot = alloca i64
  store i64 zeroinitializer, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  store i64 %value0, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.pack = load i64, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_lookup_copy$Int$Int %ok.tag, i64 %ok.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.map_lookup_copy$Int$Int %ok.value

missing:
  %reason0 = insertvalue %evid.type.MapBindingFailure zeroinitializer, i32 2, 0
  %fail.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_lookup_copy$Int$Int zeroinitializer, i8 1, 0
  %fail.pack.slot = alloca i64
  store i64 zeroinitializer, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  store %evid.type.MapBindingFailure %reason0, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.pack = load i64, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_lookup_copy$Int$Int %fail.tag, i64 %fail.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.map_lookup_copy$Int$Int %fail.value
}

define %evid.yield.map_bind_new$Text$Int @evid$map_bind_new$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0, { ptr, i64 } %arg1, i64 %arg2) {
entry:
  %old_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %old_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %new_entry0 = insertvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ zeroinitializer, { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %new_entry1 = insertvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %new_entry0, i64 %arg2, 1
  br label %scan

scan:
  %index0 = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %next0, %scan_next ]
  %at_end0 = icmp eq i64 %index0, %old_count0
  br i1 %at_end0, label %at_end, label %probe

probe:
  %offset0 = mul i64 %index0, 24
  %entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %old_data0, i64 %offset0
  %entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %entry_ptr0
  %candidate_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %entry0, 0
  %candidate_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %candidate_key0, 0
  %candidate_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %candidate_key0, 1
  %lookup_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %lookup_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 1
  %candidate_shorter0 = icmp ult i64 %candidate_count0, %lookup_count0
  %min_count0 = select i1 %candidate_shorter0, i64 %candidate_count0, i64 %lookup_count0
  %min_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %min_count0, 0
  br i1 %min_empty0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_compare

key_bytes_compare:
  %key_cmp0 = call i32 @memcmp(ptr %candidate_data0, ptr %lookup_data0, i64 %min_count0)
  %bytes_equal0 = icmp eq i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %bytes_equal0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_ordered

key_bytes_ordered:
  %candidate_bytes_less0 = icmp slt i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %candidate_bytes_less0, label %scan_next, label %insert_before

key_bytes_equal_prefix:
  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i64 %candidate_count0, %lookup_count0
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %duplicate, label %key_prefix_not_equal

key_prefix_not_equal:
  br i1 %candidate_shorter0, label %scan_next, label %insert_before

scan_next:
  %next0 = add i64 %index0, 1
  br label %scan

at_end:
  br label %insert_at_index

insert_before:
  br label %insert_at_index

duplicate:
  br label %already_bound

insert_at_index:
  %new_count0 = add i64 %old_count0, 1
  %prefix_bytes0 = mul i64 %index0, 24
  %suffix_count0 = sub i64 %old_count0, %index0
  %suffix_bytes0 = mul i64 %suffix_count0, 24
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %new_count0, 24
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %data0, ptr %old_data0, i64 %prefix_bytes0, i1 false)
  %new_slot0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %prefix_bytes0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %new_entry1, ptr %new_slot0
  %suffix_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %old_data0, i64 %prefix_bytes0
  %suffix_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %new_slot0, i64 24
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %suffix_dest0, ptr %suffix_src0, i64 %suffix_bytes0, i1 false)
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %new_count0, 1
  %ok.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_bind_new$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 0, 0
  %ok.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  store { ptr, i64 } %carrier1, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_bind_new$Text$Int %ok.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %ok.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.map_bind_new$Text$Int %ok.value

already_bound:
  %reason0 = insertvalue %evid.type.MapBindingFailure zeroinitializer, i32 3, 0
  %fail.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_bind_new$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 1, 0
  %fail.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  store %evid.type.MapBindingFailure %reason0, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_bind_new$Text$Int %fail.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %fail.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.map_bind_new$Text$Int %fail.value

}

define %evid.yield.nonempty_map_replace_bound$Text$Int @evid$nonempty_map_replace_bound$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0, { ptr, i64 } %arg1, i64 %arg2) {
entry:
  %old_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %old_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %new_entry0 = insertvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ zeroinitializer, { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %new_entry1 = insertvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %new_entry0, i64 %arg2, 1
  br label %scan

scan:
  %index0 = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %next0, %scan_next ]
  %at_end0 = icmp eq i64 %index0, %old_count0
  br i1 %at_end0, label %at_end, label %probe

probe:
  %offset0 = mul i64 %index0, 24
  %entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %old_data0, i64 %offset0
  %entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %entry_ptr0
  %candidate_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %entry0, 0
  %candidate_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %candidate_key0, 0
  %candidate_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %candidate_key0, 1
  %lookup_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %lookup_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 1
  %candidate_shorter0 = icmp ult i64 %candidate_count0, %lookup_count0
  %min_count0 = select i1 %candidate_shorter0, i64 %candidate_count0, i64 %lookup_count0
  %min_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %min_count0, 0
  br i1 %min_empty0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_compare

key_bytes_compare:
  %key_cmp0 = call i32 @memcmp(ptr %candidate_data0, ptr %lookup_data0, i64 %min_count0)
  %bytes_equal0 = icmp eq i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %bytes_equal0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_ordered

key_bytes_ordered:
  %candidate_bytes_less0 = icmp slt i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %candidate_bytes_less0, label %scan_next, label %insert_before

key_bytes_equal_prefix:
  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i64 %candidate_count0, %lookup_count0
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %duplicate, label %key_prefix_not_equal

key_prefix_not_equal:
  br i1 %candidate_shorter0, label %scan_next, label %insert_before

scan_next:
  %next0 = add i64 %index0, 1
  br label %scan

at_end:
  br label %missing

insert_before:
  br label %missing

duplicate:
  br label %replace_existing

replace_existing:
  %replace_bytes0 = mul i64 %old_count0, 24
  %replace_data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %replace_bytes0)
  %replace_prefix_bytes0 = mul i64 %index0, 24
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %replace_data0, ptr %old_data0, i64 %replace_prefix_bytes0, i1 false)
  %replace_slot0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %replace_data0, i64 %replace_prefix_bytes0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %new_entry1, ptr %replace_slot0
  %after_index0 = add i64 %index0, 1
  %replace_suffix_count0 = sub i64 %old_count0, %after_index0
  %replace_suffix_bytes0 = mul i64 %replace_suffix_count0, 24
  %replace_suffix_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %old_data0, i64 24
  %replace_suffix_src1 = getelementptr i8, ptr %replace_suffix_src0, i64 %replace_prefix_bytes0
  %replace_suffix_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %replace_slot0, i64 24
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %replace_suffix_dest0, ptr %replace_suffix_src1, i64 %replace_suffix_bytes0, i1 false)
  %replace_carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %replace_data0, 0
  %replace_carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %replace_carrier0, i64 %old_count0, 1
  %ok.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_replace_bound$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 0, 0
  %ok.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  store { ptr, i64 } %replace_carrier1, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_replace_bound$Text$Int %ok.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %ok.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.nonempty_map_replace_bound$Text$Int %ok.value

missing:
  %reason0 = insertvalue %evid.type.MapBindingFailure zeroinitializer, i32 2, 0
  %fail.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_replace_bound$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 1, 0
  %fail.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  store %evid.type.MapBindingFailure %reason0, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_replace_bound$Text$Int %fail.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %fail.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.nonempty_map_replace_bound$Text$Int %fail.value

}

define %evid.yield.map_replace_bound$Text$Int @evid$map_replace_bound$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0, { ptr, i64 } %arg1, i64 %arg2) {
entry:
  %old_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %old_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %new_entry0 = insertvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ zeroinitializer, { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %new_entry1 = insertvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %new_entry0, i64 %arg2, 1
  br label %scan

scan:
  %index0 = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %next0, %scan_next ]
  %at_end0 = icmp eq i64 %index0, %old_count0
  br i1 %at_end0, label %at_end, label %probe

probe:
  %offset0 = mul i64 %index0, 24
  %entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %old_data0, i64 %offset0
  %entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %entry_ptr0
  %candidate_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %entry0, 0
  %candidate_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %candidate_key0, 0
  %candidate_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %candidate_key0, 1
  %lookup_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %lookup_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 1
  %candidate_shorter0 = icmp ult i64 %candidate_count0, %lookup_count0
  %min_count0 = select i1 %candidate_shorter0, i64 %candidate_count0, i64 %lookup_count0
  %min_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %min_count0, 0
  br i1 %min_empty0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_compare

key_bytes_compare:
  %key_cmp0 = call i32 @memcmp(ptr %candidate_data0, ptr %lookup_data0, i64 %min_count0)
  %bytes_equal0 = icmp eq i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %bytes_equal0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_ordered

key_bytes_ordered:
  %candidate_bytes_less0 = icmp slt i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %candidate_bytes_less0, label %scan_next, label %insert_before

key_bytes_equal_prefix:
  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i64 %candidate_count0, %lookup_count0
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %duplicate, label %key_prefix_not_equal

key_prefix_not_equal:
  br i1 %candidate_shorter0, label %scan_next, label %insert_before

scan_next:
  %next0 = add i64 %index0, 1
  br label %scan

at_end:
  br label %missing

insert_before:
  br label %missing

duplicate:
  br label %replace_existing

replace_existing:
  %replace_bytes0 = mul i64 %old_count0, 24
  %replace_data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %replace_bytes0)
  %replace_prefix_bytes0 = mul i64 %index0, 24
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %replace_data0, ptr %old_data0, i64 %replace_prefix_bytes0, i1 false)
  %replace_slot0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %replace_data0, i64 %replace_prefix_bytes0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %new_entry1, ptr %replace_slot0
  %after_index0 = add i64 %index0, 1
  %replace_suffix_count0 = sub i64 %old_count0, %after_index0
  %replace_suffix_bytes0 = mul i64 %replace_suffix_count0, 24
  %replace_suffix_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %old_data0, i64 24
  %replace_suffix_src1 = getelementptr i8, ptr %replace_suffix_src0, i64 %replace_prefix_bytes0
  %replace_suffix_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %replace_slot0, i64 24
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %replace_suffix_dest0, ptr %replace_suffix_src1, i64 %replace_suffix_bytes0, i1 false)
  %replace_carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %replace_data0, 0
  %replace_carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %replace_carrier0, i64 %old_count0, 1
  %ok.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_replace_bound$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 0, 0
  %ok.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  store { ptr, i64 } %replace_carrier1, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_replace_bound$Text$Int %ok.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %ok.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.map_replace_bound$Text$Int %ok.value

missing:
  %reason0 = insertvalue %evid.type.MapBindingFailure zeroinitializer, i32 2, 0
  %fail.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_replace_bound$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 1, 0
  %fail.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  store %evid.type.MapBindingFailure %reason0, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_replace_bound$Text$Int %fail.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %fail.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.map_replace_bound$Text$Int %fail.value

}

define { ptr, i64 } @evid$map_bind_or_replace$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0, { ptr, i64 } %arg1, i64 %arg2) {
entry:
  %old_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %old_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %new_entry0 = insertvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ zeroinitializer, { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %new_entry1 = insertvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %new_entry0, i64 %arg2, 1
  br label %scan

scan:
  %index0 = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %next0, %scan_next ]
  %at_end0 = icmp eq i64 %index0, %old_count0
  br i1 %at_end0, label %at_end, label %probe

probe:
  %offset0 = mul i64 %index0, 24
  %entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %old_data0, i64 %offset0
  %entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %entry_ptr0
  %candidate_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %entry0, 0
  %candidate_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %candidate_key0, 0
  %candidate_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %candidate_key0, 1
  %lookup_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %lookup_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 1
  %candidate_shorter0 = icmp ult i64 %candidate_count0, %lookup_count0
  %min_count0 = select i1 %candidate_shorter0, i64 %candidate_count0, i64 %lookup_count0
  %min_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %min_count0, 0
  br i1 %min_empty0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_compare

key_bytes_compare:
  %key_cmp0 = call i32 @memcmp(ptr %candidate_data0, ptr %lookup_data0, i64 %min_count0)
  %bytes_equal0 = icmp eq i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %bytes_equal0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_ordered

key_bytes_ordered:
  %candidate_bytes_less0 = icmp slt i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %candidate_bytes_less0, label %scan_next, label %insert_before

key_bytes_equal_prefix:
  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i64 %candidate_count0, %lookup_count0
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %duplicate, label %key_prefix_not_equal

key_prefix_not_equal:
  br i1 %candidate_shorter0, label %scan_next, label %insert_before

scan_next:
  %next0 = add i64 %index0, 1
  br label %scan

at_end:
  br label %insert_at_index

insert_before:
  br label %insert_at_index

duplicate:
  br label %replace_existing

insert_at_index:
  %new_count0 = add i64 %old_count0, 1
  %prefix_bytes0 = mul i64 %index0, 24
  %suffix_count0 = sub i64 %old_count0, %index0
  %suffix_bytes0 = mul i64 %suffix_count0, 24
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %new_count0, 24
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %data0, ptr %old_data0, i64 %prefix_bytes0, i1 false)
  %new_slot0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %prefix_bytes0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %new_entry1, ptr %new_slot0
  %suffix_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %old_data0, i64 %prefix_bytes0
  %suffix_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %new_slot0, i64 24
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %suffix_dest0, ptr %suffix_src0, i64 %suffix_bytes0, i1 false)
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %new_count0, 1
  ret { ptr, i64 } %carrier1

replace_existing:
  %replace_bytes0 = mul i64 %old_count0, 24
  %replace_data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %replace_bytes0)
  %replace_prefix_bytes0 = mul i64 %index0, 24
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %replace_data0, ptr %old_data0, i64 %replace_prefix_bytes0, i1 false)
  %replace_slot0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %replace_data0, i64 %replace_prefix_bytes0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %new_entry1, ptr %replace_slot0
  %after_index0 = add i64 %index0, 1
  %replace_suffix_count0 = sub i64 %old_count0, %after_index0
  %replace_suffix_bytes0 = mul i64 %replace_suffix_count0, 24
  %replace_suffix_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %old_data0, i64 24
  %replace_suffix_src1 = getelementptr i8, ptr %replace_suffix_src0, i64 %replace_prefix_bytes0
  %replace_suffix_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %replace_slot0, i64 24
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %replace_suffix_dest0, ptr %replace_suffix_src1, i64 %replace_suffix_bytes0, i1 false)
  %replace_carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %replace_data0, 0
  %replace_carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %replace_carrier0, i64 %old_count0, 1
  ret { ptr, i64 } %replace_carrier1

}

define %evid.yield.nonempty_map_remove_bound$Text$Int @evid$nonempty_map_remove_bound$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0, { ptr, i64 } %arg1) {
entry:
  %old_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %old_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  br label %scan

scan:
  %index0 = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %next0, %not_match ]
  %at_end0 = icmp eq i64 %index0, %old_count0
  br i1 %at_end0, label %missing, label %probe

probe:
  %offset0 = mul i64 %index0, 24
  %entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %old_data0, i64 %offset0
  %entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %entry_ptr0
  %candidate_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %entry0, 0
  %candidate_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %candidate_key0, 0
  %candidate_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %candidate_key0, 1
  %lookup_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %lookup_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 1
  %key_size_equal0 = icmp eq i64 %candidate_count0, %lookup_count0
  br i1 %key_size_equal0, label %key_size_equal, label %not_match

key_size_equal:
  %key_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %candidate_count0, 0
  br i1 %key_empty0, label %found, label %key_bytes_compare

key_bytes_compare:
  %key_cmp0 = call i32 @memcmp(ptr %candidate_data0, ptr %lookup_data0, i64 %candidate_count0)
  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %found, label %not_match

not_match:
  %next0 = add i64 %index0, 1
  br label %scan

found:
  %new_count0 = sub i64 %old_count0, 1
  %result_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %new_count0, 0
  br i1 %result_empty0, label %removed_empty, label %removed_nonempty

removed_nonempty:
  %prefix_bytes0 = mul i64 %index0, 24
  %after_index0 = add i64 %index0, 1
  %suffix_count0 = sub i64 %old_count0, %after_index0
  %suffix_bytes0 = mul i64 %suffix_count0, 24
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %new_count0, 24
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %data0, ptr %old_data0, i64 %prefix_bytes0, i1 false)
  %suffix_src_offset0 = mul i64 %after_index0, 24
  %suffix_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %old_data0, i64 %suffix_src_offset0
  %suffix_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %prefix_bytes0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %suffix_dest0, ptr %suffix_src0, i64 %suffix_bytes0, i1 false)
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %new_count0, 1
  %ok_nonempty.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_remove_bound$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 0, 0
  %ok_nonempty.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %ok_nonempty.pack.slot
  store { ptr, i64 } %carrier1, ptr %ok_nonempty.pack.slot
  %ok_nonempty.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %ok_nonempty.pack.slot
  %ok_nonempty.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_remove_bound$Text$Int %ok_nonempty.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %ok_nonempty.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.nonempty_map_remove_bound$Text$Int %ok_nonempty.value

removed_empty:
  %ok_empty.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_remove_bound$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 0, 0
  %ok_empty.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %ok_empty.pack.slot
  store { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %ok_empty.pack.slot
  %ok_empty.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %ok_empty.pack.slot
  %ok_empty.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_remove_bound$Text$Int %ok_empty.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %ok_empty.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.nonempty_map_remove_bound$Text$Int %ok_empty.value

  %fail.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_remove_bound$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 1, 0
  %fail.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  store %evid.type.MapBindingFailure %reason0, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_remove_bound$Text$Int %fail.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %fail.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.nonempty_map_remove_bound$Text$Int %fail.value
}

define %evid.yield.map_remove_bound$Text$Int @evid$map_remove_bound$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0, { ptr, i64 } %arg1) {
entry:
  %old_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %old_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  br label %scan

scan:

  %at_end0 = icmp eq i64 %index0, %old_count0

  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %found, label %not_match

not_match:
  %next0 = add i64 %index0, 1
  br label %scan

found:
  %new_count0 = sub i64 %old_count0, 1
  %result_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %new_count0, 0
  br i1 %result_empty0, label %removed_empty, label %removed_nonempty

removed_nonempty:
  %prefix_bytes0 = mul i64 %index0, 24
  %after_index0 = add i64 %index0, 1
  %suffix_count0 = sub i64 %old_count0, %after_index0
  %suffix_bytes0 = mul i64 %suffix_count0, 24
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %new_count0, 24
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %data0, ptr %old_data0, i64 %prefix_bytes0, i1 false)
  %suffix_src_offset0 = mul i64 %after_index0, 24
  %suffix_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %old_data0, i64 %suffix_src_offset0
  %suffix_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %prefix_bytes0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %suffix_dest0, ptr %suffix_src0, i64 %suffix_bytes0, i1 false)

define %evid.yield.map_remove_bound$Int$Int @evid$map_remove_bound$Int$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0, i64 %arg1) {
entry:
  %old_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %old_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  br label %scan

scan:
  %index0 = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %next0, %not_match ]
  %at_end0 = icmp eq i64 %index0, %old_count0
  br i1 %at_end0, label %missing, label %probe

probe:
  %offset0 = mul i64 %index0, 16
  %entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %old_data0, i64 %offset0
  %entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Int__Int_, ptr %entry_ptr0
  %candidate_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Int__Int_ %entry0, 0
  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i64 %candidate_key0, %arg1
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %found, label %not_match

not_match:
  %next0 = add i64 %index0, 1
  br label %scan

  %result_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %new_count0, 0
  br i1 %result_empty0, label %removed_empty, label %removed_nonempty

removed_nonempty:
  %prefix_bytes0 = mul i64 %index0, 16
  %after_index0 = add i64 %index0, 1
  %suffix_count0 = sub i64 %old_count0, %after_index0
  %suffix_bytes0 = mul i64 %suffix_count0, 16
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %new_count0, 16
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %data0, ptr %old_data0, i64 %prefix_bytes0, i1 false)
  %suffix_src_offset0 = mul i64 %after_index0, 16
  %suffix_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %old_data0, i64 %suffix_src_offset0
  %suffix_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %prefix_bytes0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %suffix_dest0, ptr %suffix_src0, i64 %suffix_bytes0, i1 false)
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %new_count0, 1
  %ok_nonempty.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_remove_bound$Int$Int zeroinitializer, i8 0, 0

  store { ptr, i64 } %carrier1, ptr %ok_nonempty.pack.slot

  %ok_empty.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %ok_empty.pack.slot
  store { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %ok_empty.pack.slot

define %evid.yield.map_merge_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int @evid$map_merge_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0, { ptr, i64 } %arg1) {
entry:

  %left_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %right_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %right_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 1
  %max_count0 = add i64 %left_count0, %right_count0
  %result_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %max_count0, 0
  br i1 %result_empty0, label %return_empty, label %allocate

return_empty:
  %ok_empty.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_merge_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 0, 0
  %ok_empty.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %ok_empty.pack.slot
  store { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %ok_empty.pack.slot
  %ok_empty.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %ok_empty.pack.slot
  %ok_empty.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_merge_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %ok_empty.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %ok_empty.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.map_merge_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %ok_empty.value

allocate:
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %max_count0, 24
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  %left_index_slot = alloca i64
  %right_index_slot = alloca i64
  %out_index_slot = alloca i64
  store i64 0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

merge_loop:
  %left_index0 = load i64, ptr %left_index_slot
  %right_index0 = load i64, ptr %right_index_slot
  %out_index0 = load i64, ptr %out_index_slot
  %left_done0 = icmp eq i64 %left_index0, %left_count0
  br i1 %left_done0, label %left_exhausted, label %left_available

left_exhausted:
  %right_done0 = icmp eq i64 %right_index0, %right_count0
  br i1 %right_done0, label %merge_done, label %copy_right_tail

left_available:
  %right_done1 = icmp eq i64 %right_index0, %right_count0
  br i1 %right_done1, label %copy_left_tail, label %compare_keys

copy_right_tail:
  %right_remaining0 = sub i64 %right_count0, %right_index0
  %right_tail_bytes0 = mul i64 %right_remaining0, 24
  %right_tail_src_offset0 = mul i64 %right_index0, 24
  %right_tail_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_tail_src_offset0
  %right_tail_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %right_tail_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %right_tail_dest_offset0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %right_tail_dest0, ptr %right_tail_src0, i64 %right_tail_bytes0, i1 false)
  %right_tail_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, %right_remaining0
  store i64 %right_tail_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_done

copy_left_tail:
  %left_remaining0 = sub i64 %left_count0, %left_index0
  %left_tail_bytes0 = mul i64 %left_remaining0, 24
  %left_tail_src_offset0 = mul i64 %left_index0, 24
  %left_tail_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_tail_src_offset0
  %left_tail_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %left_tail_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %left_tail_dest_offset0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %left_tail_dest0, ptr %left_tail_src0, i64 %left_tail_bytes0, i1 false)
  %left_tail_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, %left_remaining0
  store i64 %left_tail_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_done

compare_keys:
  %left_offset0 = mul i64 %left_index0, 24
  %left_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_offset0
  %left_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %left_entry_ptr0
  %left_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %left_entry0, 0
  %right_offset0 = mul i64 %right_index0, 24
  %right_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_offset0
  %right_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %right_entry_ptr0
  %right_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, 0
  %left_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %left_key0, 0
  %left_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %left_key0, 1
  %right_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %right_key0, 0
  %right_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %right_key0, 1
  %left_key_shorter0 = icmp ult i64 %left_key_count0, %right_key_count0
  %min_key_count0 = select i1 %left_key_shorter0, i64 %left_key_count0, i64 %right_key_count0
  %min_key_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %min_key_count0, 0
  br i1 %min_key_empty0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_compare

key_bytes_compare:
  %key_cmp0 = call i32 @memcmp(ptr %left_key_data0, ptr %right_key_data0, i64 %min_key_count0)
  %key_bytes_equal0 = icmp eq i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %key_bytes_equal0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_ordered

key_bytes_ordered:
  %left_key_bytes_less0 = icmp slt i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %left_key_bytes_less0, label %take_left, label %take_right

key_bytes_equal_prefix:
  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i64 %left_key_count0, %right_key_count0
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %shared_key, label %key_prefix_not_equal

key_prefix_not_equal:
  br i1 %left_key_shorter0, label %take_left, label %take_right

take_left:
  %take_left_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %take_left_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %take_left_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %left_entry0, ptr %take_left_out_ptr0
  %take_left_next0 = add i64 %left_index0, 1
  %take_left_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %take_left_next0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 %take_left_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

take_right:
  %take_right_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %take_right_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %take_right_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, ptr %take_right_out_ptr0
  %take_right_next0 = add i64 %right_index0, 1
  %take_right_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %take_right_next0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 %take_right_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

shared_key:
  %reason0 = insertvalue %evid.type.MapMergeFailure zeroinitializer, i32 4, 0
  %fail.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_merge_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 1, 0
  %fail.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  store %evid.type.MapMergeFailure %reason0, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_merge_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %fail.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %fail.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.map_merge_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %fail.value

merge_done:
  %merged_count0 = load i64, ptr %out_index_slot
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %merged_count0, 1
  %ok.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_merge_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 0, 0
  %ok.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  store { ptr, i64 } %carrier1, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_merge_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %ok.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %ok.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.map_merge_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %ok.value
}

define %evid.yield.map_merge_left_nonempty_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int @evid$map_merge_left_nonempty_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0, { ptr, i64 } %arg1) {
entry:
  %left_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %left_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %right_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %right_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 1
  %max_count0 = add i64 %left_count0, %right_count0
  %result_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %max_count0, 0
  br i1 %result_empty0, label %return_empty, label %allocate

return_empty:
  %ok_empty.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_merge_left_nonempty_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 0, 0
  %ok_empty.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }

  %right_done0 = icmp eq i64 %right_index0, %right_count0

  store i64 %right_tail_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_done

copy_left_tail:
  %left_remaining0 = sub i64 %left_count0, %left_index0
  %left_tail_bytes0 = mul i64 %left_remaining0, 24
  %left_tail_src_offset0 = mul i64 %left_index0, 24
  %left_tail_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_tail_src_offset0
  %left_tail_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %left_tail_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %left_tail_dest_offset0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %left_tail_dest0, ptr %left_tail_src0, i64 %left_tail_bytes0, i1 false)
  %left_tail_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, %left_remaining0
  store i64 %left_tail_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_done

compare_keys:
  %left_offset0 = mul i64 %left_index0, 24
  %left_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_offset0
  %left_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %left_entry_ptr0
  %left_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %left_entry0, 0
  %right_offset0 = mul i64 %right_index0, 24
  %right_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_offset0
  %right_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %right_entry_ptr0
  %right_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, 0
  %left_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %left_key0, 0
  %left_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %left_key0, 1
  %right_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %right_key0, 0
  %right_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %right_key0, 1
  %left_key_shorter0 = icmp ult i64 %left_key_count0, %right_key_count0
  %min_key_count0 = select i1 %left_key_shorter0, i64 %left_key_count0, i64 %right_key_count0
  %min_key_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %min_key_count0, 0
  br i1 %min_key_empty0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_compare

key_bytes_compare:
  %key_cmp0 = call i32 @memcmp(ptr %left_key_data0, ptr %right_key_data0, i64 %min_key_count0)
  %key_bytes_equal0 = icmp eq i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %key_bytes_equal0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_ordered

key_bytes_ordered:
  %left_key_bytes_less0 = icmp slt i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %left_key_bytes_less0, label %take_left, label %take_right

  br i1 %key_equal0, label %shared_key, label %key_prefix_not_equal

key_prefix_not_equal:
  br i1 %left_key_shorter0, label %take_left, label %take_right

take_left:

  %take_left_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %take_left_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %left_entry0, ptr %take_left_out_ptr0
  %take_left_next0 = add i64 %left_index0, 1
  %take_left_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %take_left_next0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 %take_left_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

take_right:
  %take_right_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %take_right_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %take_right_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, ptr %take_right_out_ptr0
  %take_right_next0 = add i64 %right_index0, 1
  %take_right_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %take_right_next0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 %take_right_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

shared_key:
  %reason0 = insertvalue %evid.type.MapMergeFailure zeroinitializer, i32 4, 0
  %fail.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_merge_left_nonempty_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 1, 0
  %fail.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  store %evid.type.MapMergeFailure %reason0, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_merge_left_nonempty_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %fail.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %fail.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.map_merge_left_nonempty_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %fail.value

merge_done:
  %merged_count0 = load i64, ptr %out_index_slot
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %merged_count0, 1
  %ok.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_merge_left_nonempty_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 0, 0
  %ok.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  store { ptr, i64 } %carrier1, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_merge_left_nonempty_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %ok.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %ok.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.map_merge_left_nonempty_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %ok.value
}

  %right_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, 0

  %key_bytes_equal0 = icmp eq i32 %key_cmp0, 0

key_bytes_ordered:

  br i1 %left_key_bytes_less0, label %take_left, label %take_right
