  br i1 %key_equal0, label %shared_key, label %key_prefix_not_equal

key_prefix_not_equal:
  br i1 %left_key_shorter0, label %take_left, label %take_right

take_left:
  %take_left_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %take_left_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %take_left_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %left_entry0, ptr %take_left_out_ptr0
  %take_left_next0 = add i64 %left_index0, 1
  %take_left_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %take_left_next0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 %take_left_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

take_right:
  %take_right_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %take_right_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %take_right_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, ptr %take_right_out_ptr0
  %take_right_next0 = add i64 %right_index0, 1
  %take_right_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %take_right_next0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 %take_right_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

shared_key:
  %reason0 = insertvalue %evid.type.MapMergeFailure zeroinitializer, i32 4, 0
  %fail.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_merge_right_nonempty_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 1, 0
  %fail.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  store %evid.type.MapMergeFailure %reason0, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_merge_right_nonempty_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %fail.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %fail.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.map_merge_right_nonempty_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %fail.value

merge_done:
  %merged_count0 = load i64, ptr %out_index_slot
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %merged_count0, 1
  %ok.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_merge_right_nonempty_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 0, 0
  %ok.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  store { ptr, i64 } %carrier1, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_merge_right_nonempty_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %ok.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %ok.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.map_merge_right_nonempty_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %ok.value
}

define %evid.yield.nonempty_map_merge_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int @evid$nonempty_map_merge_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0, { ptr, i64 } %arg1) {
entry:
  %left_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %left_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %right_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %right_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 1
  %max_count0 = add i64 %left_count0, %right_count0
  %result_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %max_count0, 0
  br i1 %result_empty0, label %return_empty, label %allocate

return_empty:
  %ok_empty.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_merge_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 0, 0
  %ok_empty.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %ok_empty.pack.slot
  store { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %ok_empty.pack.slot
  %ok_empty.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %ok_empty.pack.slot
  %ok_empty.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_merge_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %ok_empty.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %ok_empty.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.nonempty_map_merge_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %ok_empty.value

allocate:
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %max_count0, 24
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  %left_index_slot = alloca i64
  %right_index_slot = alloca i64
  %out_index_slot = alloca i64
  store i64 0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

merge_loop:
  %left_index0 = load i64, ptr %left_index_slot
  %right_index0 = load i64, ptr %right_index_slot
  %out_index0 = load i64, ptr %out_index_slot
  %left_done0 = icmp eq i64 %left_index0, %left_count0
  br i1 %left_done0, label %left_exhausted, label %left_available

left_exhausted:
  %right_done0 = icmp eq i64 %right_index0, %right_count0
  br i1 %right_done0, label %merge_done, label %copy_right_tail

left_available:
  %right_done1 = icmp eq i64 %right_index0, %right_count0
  br i1 %right_done1, label %copy_left_tail, label %compare_keys

copy_right_tail:
  %right_remaining0 = sub i64 %right_count0, %right_index0
  %right_tail_bytes0 = mul i64 %right_remaining0, 24
  %right_tail_src_offset0 = mul i64 %right_index0, 24
  %right_tail_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_tail_src_offset0
  %right_tail_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %right_tail_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %right_tail_dest_offset0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %right_tail_dest0, ptr %right_tail_src0, i64 %right_tail_bytes0, i1 false)
  %right_tail_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, %right_remaining0
  store i64 %right_tail_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_done

copy_left_tail:
  %left_remaining0 = sub i64 %left_count0, %left_index0
  %left_tail_bytes0 = mul i64 %left_remaining0, 24
  %left_tail_src_offset0 = mul i64 %left_index0, 24
  %left_tail_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_tail_src_offset0
  %left_tail_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %left_tail_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %left_tail_dest_offset0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %left_tail_dest0, ptr %left_tail_src0, i64 %left_tail_bytes0, i1 false)
  %left_tail_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, %left_remaining0
  store i64 %left_tail_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_done

compare_keys:
  %left_offset0 = mul i64 %left_index0, 24
  %left_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_offset0
  %left_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %left_entry_ptr0
  %left_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %left_entry0, 0
  %right_offset0 = mul i64 %right_index0, 24
  %right_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_offset0
  %right_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %right_entry_ptr0
  %right_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, 0
  %left_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %left_key0, 0
  %left_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %left_key0, 1
  %right_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %right_key0, 0
  %right_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %right_key0, 1
  %left_key_shorter0 = icmp ult i64 %left_key_count0, %right_key_count0
  %min_key_count0 = select i1 %left_key_shorter0, i64 %left_key_count0, i64 %right_key_count0
  %min_key_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %min_key_count0, 0
  br i1 %min_key_empty0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_compare

key_bytes_compare:
  %key_cmp0 = call i32 @memcmp(ptr %left_key_data0, ptr %right_key_data0, i64 %min_key_count0)
  %key_bytes_equal0 = icmp eq i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %key_bytes_equal0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_ordered

key_bytes_ordered:
  %left_key_bytes_less0 = icmp slt i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %left_key_bytes_less0, label %take_left, label %take_right

key_bytes_equal_prefix:
  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i64 %left_key_count0, %right_key_count0
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %shared_key, label %key_prefix_not_equal

key_prefix_not_equal:
  br i1 %left_key_shorter0, label %take_left, label %take_right

take_left:
  %take_left_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %take_left_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %take_left_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %left_entry0, ptr %take_left_out_ptr0
  %take_left_next0 = add i64 %left_index0, 1
  %take_left_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %take_left_next0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 %take_left_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

take_right:
  %take_right_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %take_right_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %take_right_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, ptr %take_right_out_ptr0
  %take_right_next0 = add i64 %right_index0, 1
  %take_right_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %take_right_next0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 %take_right_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

shared_key:
  %reason0 = insertvalue %evid.type.MapMergeFailure zeroinitializer, i32 4, 0
  %fail.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_merge_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 1, 0
  %fail.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  store %evid.type.MapMergeFailure %reason0, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_merge_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %fail.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %fail.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.nonempty_map_merge_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %fail.value

merge_done:
  %merged_count0 = load i64, ptr %out_index_slot
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %merged_count0, 1
  %ok.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_merge_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 0, 0
  %ok.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  store { ptr, i64 } %carrier1, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_merge_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %ok.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %ok.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.nonempty_map_merge_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %ok.value
}

define { ptr, i64 } @evid$map_merge_using_left_bindings_for_shared_keys$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0, { ptr, i64 } %arg1) {
entry:
  %left_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %left_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %right_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %right_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 1
  %max_count0 = add i64 %left_count0, %right_count0
  %result_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %max_count0, 0
  br i1 %result_empty0, label %return_empty, label %allocate

return_empty:
  ret { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer

allocate:
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %max_count0, 24
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  %left_index_slot = alloca i64
  %right_index_slot = alloca i64
  %out_index_slot = alloca i64
  store i64 0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

merge_loop:
  %left_index0 = load i64, ptr %left_index_slot
  %right_index0 = load i64, ptr %right_index_slot
  %out_index0 = load i64, ptr %out_index_slot
  %left_done0 = icmp eq i64 %left_index0, %left_count0
  br i1 %left_done0, label %left_exhausted, label %left_available

left_exhausted:
  %right_done0 = icmp eq i64 %right_index0, %right_count0
  br i1 %right_done0, label %merge_done, label %copy_right_tail

left_available:
  %right_done1 = icmp eq i64 %right_index0, %right_count0
  br i1 %right_done1, label %copy_left_tail, label %compare_keys

copy_right_tail:
  %right_remaining0 = sub i64 %right_count0, %right_index0
  %right_tail_bytes0 = mul i64 %right_remaining0, 24
  %right_tail_src_offset0 = mul i64 %right_index0, 24
  %right_tail_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_tail_src_offset0
  %right_tail_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %right_tail_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %right_tail_dest_offset0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %right_tail_dest0, ptr %right_tail_src0, i64 %right_tail_bytes0, i1 false)
  %right_tail_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, %right_remaining0
  store i64 %right_tail_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_done

copy_left_tail:
  %left_remaining0 = sub i64 %left_count0, %left_index0
  %left_tail_bytes0 = mul i64 %left_remaining0, 24
  %left_tail_src_offset0 = mul i64 %left_index0, 24
  %left_tail_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_tail_src_offset0
  %left_tail_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %left_tail_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %left_tail_dest_offset0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %left_tail_dest0, ptr %left_tail_src0, i64 %left_tail_bytes0, i1 false)
  %left_tail_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, %left_remaining0
  store i64 %left_tail_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_done

compare_keys:
  %left_offset0 = mul i64 %left_index0, 24
  %left_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_offset0
  %left_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %left_entry_ptr0
  %left_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %left_entry0, 0
  %right_offset0 = mul i64 %right_index0, 24
  %right_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_offset0
  %right_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %right_entry_ptr0
  %right_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, 0
  %left_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %left_key0, 0
  %left_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %left_key0, 1
  %right_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %right_key0, 0
  %right_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %right_key0, 1
  %left_key_shorter0 = icmp ult i64 %left_key_count0, %right_key_count0
  %min_key_count0 = select i1 %left_key_shorter0, i64 %left_key_count0, i64 %right_key_count0
  %min_key_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %min_key_count0, 0
  br i1 %min_key_empty0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_compare

key_bytes_compare:
  %key_cmp0 = call i32 @memcmp(ptr %left_key_data0, ptr %right_key_data0, i64 %min_key_count0)
  %key_bytes_equal0 = icmp eq i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %key_bytes_equal0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_ordered

key_bytes_ordered:
  %left_key_bytes_less0 = icmp slt i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %left_key_bytes_less0, label %take_left, label %take_right

key_bytes_equal_prefix:
  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i64 %left_key_count0, %right_key_count0
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %shared_key, label %key_prefix_not_equal

key_prefix_not_equal:
  br i1 %left_key_shorter0, label %take_left, label %take_right

take_left:
  %take_left_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %take_left_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %take_left_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %left_entry0, ptr %take_left_out_ptr0
  %take_left_next0 = add i64 %left_index0, 1
  %take_left_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %take_left_next0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 %take_left_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

take_right:
  %take_right_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %take_right_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %take_right_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, ptr %take_right_out_ptr0
  %take_right_next0 = add i64 %right_index0, 1
  %take_right_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %take_right_next0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 %take_right_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

shared_key:
  %shared_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %shared_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %shared_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %left_entry0, ptr %shared_out_ptr0
  %shared_left_next0 = add i64 %left_index0, 1
  %shared_right_next0 = add i64 %right_index0, 1
  %shared_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %shared_left_next0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 %shared_right_next0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 %shared_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

merge_done:
  %merged_count0 = load i64, ptr %out_index_slot
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %merged_count0, 1
  ret { ptr, i64 } %carrier1
}

define { ptr, i64 } @evid$map_merge_left_nonempty_using_left_bindings_for_shared_keys$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0, { ptr, i64 } %arg1) {
entry:
  %left_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %left_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %right_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %right_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 1
  %max_count0 = add i64 %left_count0, %right_count0
  %result_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %max_count0, 0
  br i1 %result_empty0, label %return_empty, label %allocate

return_empty:
  ret { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer

allocate:
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %max_count0, 24
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  %left_index_slot = alloca i64
  %right_index_slot = alloca i64
  %out_index_slot = alloca i64
  store i64 0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

merge_loop:
  %left_index0 = load i64, ptr %left_index_slot
  %right_index0 = load i64, ptr %right_index_slot
  %out_index0 = load i64, ptr %out_index_slot
  %left_done0 = icmp eq i64 %left_index0, %left_count0
  br i1 %left_done0, label %left_exhausted, label %left_available

left_exhausted:
  %right_done0 = icmp eq i64 %right_index0, %right_count0
  br i1 %right_done0, label %merge_done, label %copy_right_tail

left_available:
  %right_done1 = icmp eq i64 %right_index0, %right_count0
  br i1 %right_done1, label %copy_left_tail, label %compare_keys

copy_right_tail:
  %right_remaining0 = sub i64 %right_count0, %right_index0
  %right_tail_bytes0 = mul i64 %right_remaining0, 24
  %right_tail_src_offset0 = mul i64 %right_index0, 24
  %right_tail_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_tail_src_offset0
  %right_tail_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %right_tail_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %right_tail_dest_offset0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %right_tail_dest0, ptr %right_tail_src0, i64 %right_tail_bytes0, i1 false)
  %right_tail_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, %right_remaining0
  store i64 %right_tail_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_done

copy_left_tail:
  %left_remaining0 = sub i64 %left_count0, %left_index0
  %left_tail_bytes0 = mul i64 %left_remaining0, 24
  %left_tail_src_offset0 = mul i64 %left_index0, 24
  %left_tail_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_tail_src_offset0
  %left_tail_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %left_tail_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %left_tail_dest_offset0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %left_tail_dest0, ptr %left_tail_src0, i64 %left_tail_bytes0, i1 false)
  %left_tail_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, %left_remaining0
  store i64 %left_tail_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_done

compare_keys:
  %left_offset0 = mul i64 %left_index0, 24
  %left_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_offset0
  %left_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %left_entry_ptr0
  %left_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %left_entry0, 0
  %right_offset0 = mul i64 %right_index0, 24
  %right_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_offset0
  %right_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %right_entry_ptr0
  %right_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, 0
  %left_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %left_key0, 0
  %left_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %left_key0, 1
  %right_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %right_key0, 0
  %right_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %right_key0, 1
  %left_key_shorter0 = icmp ult i64 %left_key_count0, %right_key_count0
  %min_key_count0 = select i1 %left_key_shorter0, i64 %left_key_count0, i64 %right_key_count0
  %min_key_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %min_key_count0, 0
  br i1 %min_key_empty0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_compare

key_bytes_compare:
  %key_cmp0 = call i32 @memcmp(ptr %left_key_data0, ptr %right_key_data0, i64 %min_key_count0)
  %key_bytes_equal0 = icmp eq i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %key_bytes_equal0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_ordered

key_bytes_ordered:
  %left_key_bytes_less0 = icmp slt i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %left_key_bytes_less0, label %take_left, label %take_right

key_bytes_equal_prefix:
  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i64 %left_key_count0, %right_key_count0
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %shared_key, label %key_prefix_not_equal

key_prefix_not_equal:
  br i1 %left_key_shorter0, label %take_left, label %take_right

take_left:
  %take_left_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %take_left_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %take_left_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %left_entry0, ptr %take_left_out_ptr0
  %take_left_next0 = add i64 %left_index0, 1
  %take_left_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %take_left_next0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 %take_left_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

take_right:
  %take_right_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %take_right_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %take_right_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, ptr %take_right_out_ptr0
  %take_right_next0 = add i64 %right_index0, 1
  %take_right_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %take_right_next0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 %take_right_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

shared_key:
  %shared_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %shared_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %shared_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %left_entry0, ptr %shared_out_ptr0
  %shared_left_next0 = add i64 %left_index0, 1
  %shared_right_next0 = add i64 %right_index0, 1
  %shared_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %shared_left_next0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 %shared_right_next0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 %shared_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

merge_done:
  %merged_count0 = load i64, ptr %out_index_slot
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %merged_count0, 1
  ret { ptr, i64 } %carrier1
}

define { ptr, i64 } @evid$map_merge_right_nonempty_using_left_bindings_for_shared_keys$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0, { ptr, i64 } %arg1) {
entry:
  %left_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %left_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %right_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %right_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 1
  %max_count0 = add i64 %left_count0, %right_count0
  %result_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %max_count0, 0
  br i1 %result_empty0, label %return_empty, label %allocate

return_empty:
  ret { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer

allocate:
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %max_count0, 24
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  %left_index_slot = alloca i64
  %right_index_slot = alloca i64
  %out_index_slot = alloca i64
  store i64 0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

merge_loop:
  %left_index0 = load i64, ptr %left_index_slot
  %right_index0 = load i64, ptr %right_index_slot
  %out_index0 = load i64, ptr %out_index_slot
  %left_done0 = icmp eq i64 %left_index0, %left_count0
  br i1 %left_done0, label %left_exhausted, label %left_available

left_exhausted:
  %right_done0 = icmp eq i64 %right_index0, %right_count0
  br i1 %right_done0, label %merge_done, label %copy_right_tail

left_available:
  %right_done1 = icmp eq i64 %right_index0, %right_count0
  br i1 %right_done1, label %copy_left_tail, label %compare_keys

copy_right_tail:
  %right_remaining0 = sub i64 %right_count0, %right_index0
  %right_tail_bytes0 = mul i64 %right_remaining0, 24
  %right_tail_src_offset0 = mul i64 %right_index0, 24
  %right_tail_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_tail_src_offset0
  %right_tail_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %right_tail_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %right_tail_dest_offset0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %right_tail_dest0, ptr %right_tail_src0, i64 %right_tail_bytes0, i1 false)
  %right_tail_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, %right_remaining0
  store i64 %right_tail_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_done

copy_left_tail:
  %left_remaining0 = sub i64 %left_count0, %left_index0
  %left_tail_bytes0 = mul i64 %left_remaining0, 24
  %left_tail_src_offset0 = mul i64 %left_index0, 24
  %left_tail_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_tail_src_offset0
  %left_tail_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %left_tail_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %left_tail_dest_offset0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %left_tail_dest0, ptr %left_tail_src0, i64 %left_tail_bytes0, i1 false)
  %left_tail_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, %left_remaining0
  store i64 %left_tail_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_done

compare_keys:
  %left_offset0 = mul i64 %left_index0, 24
  %left_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_offset0
  %left_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %left_entry_ptr0
  %left_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %left_entry0, 0
  %right_offset0 = mul i64 %right_index0, 24
  %right_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_offset0
  %right_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %right_entry_ptr0
  %right_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, 0
  %left_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %left_key0, 0
  %left_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %left_key0, 1
  %right_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %right_key0, 0
  %right_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %right_key0, 1
  %left_key_shorter0 = icmp ult i64 %left_key_count0, %right_key_count0
  %min_key_count0 = select i1 %left_key_shorter0, i64 %left_key_count0, i64 %right_key_count0
  %min_key_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %min_key_count0, 0
  br i1 %min_key_empty0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_compare

key_bytes_compare:
  %key_cmp0 = call i32 @memcmp(ptr %left_key_data0, ptr %right_key_data0, i64 %min_key_count0)
  %key_bytes_equal0 = icmp eq i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %key_bytes_equal0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_ordered

key_bytes_ordered:
  %left_key_bytes_less0 = icmp slt i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %left_key_bytes_less0, label %take_left, label %take_right

key_bytes_equal_prefix:
  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i64 %left_key_count0, %right_key_count0
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %shared_key, label %key_prefix_not_equal

key_prefix_not_equal:
  br i1 %left_key_shorter0, label %take_left, label %take_right

take_left:
  %take_left_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %take_left_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %take_left_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %left_entry0, ptr %take_left_out_ptr0
  %take_left_next0 = add i64 %left_index0, 1
  %take_left_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %take_left_next0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 %take_left_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

take_right:
  %take_right_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %take_right_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %take_right_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, ptr %take_right_out_ptr0
  %take_right_next0 = add i64 %right_index0, 1
  %take_right_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %take_right_next0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 %take_right_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

shared_key:
  %shared_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %shared_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %shared_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %left_entry0, ptr %shared_out_ptr0
  %shared_left_next0 = add i64 %left_index0, 1
  %shared_right_next0 = add i64 %right_index0, 1
  %shared_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %shared_left_next0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 %shared_right_next0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 %shared_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

merge_done:
  %merged_count0 = load i64, ptr %out_index_slot
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %merged_count0, 1
  ret { ptr, i64 } %carrier1
}

define { ptr, i64 } @evid$nonempty_map_merge_using_left_bindings_for_shared_keys$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0, { ptr, i64 } %arg1) {
entry:
  %left_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %left_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %right_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %right_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 1
  %max_count0 = add i64 %left_count0, %right_count0
  %result_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %max_count0, 0
  br i1 %result_empty0, label %return_empty, label %allocate

return_empty:
  ret { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer
