  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %max_count0, 24
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  %left_index_slot = alloca i64
  %right_index_slot = alloca i64
  %out_index_slot = alloca i64
  store i64 0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

merge_loop:
  %left_index0 = load i64, ptr %left_index_slot
  %right_index0 = load i64, ptr %right_index_slot
  %out_index0 = load i64, ptr %out_index_slot
  %left_done0 = icmp eq i64 %left_index0, %left_count0
  br i1 %left_done0, label %left_exhausted, label %left_available

left_exhausted:
  %right_done0 = icmp eq i64 %right_index0, %right_count0
  br i1 %right_done0, label %merge_done, label %copy_right_tail

left_available:
  %right_done1 = icmp eq i64 %right_index0, %right_count0
  br i1 %right_done1, label %copy_left_tail, label %compare_keys

copy_right_tail:
  %right_remaining0 = sub i64 %right_count0, %right_index0
  %right_tail_bytes0 = mul i64 %right_remaining0, 24
  %right_tail_src_offset0 = mul i64 %right_index0, 24
  %right_tail_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_tail_src_offset0
  %right_tail_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %right_tail_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %right_tail_dest_offset0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %right_tail_dest0, ptr %right_tail_src0, i64 %right_tail_bytes0, i1 false)
  %right_tail_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, %right_remaining0
  store i64 %right_tail_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_done

copy_left_tail:
  %left_remaining0 = sub i64 %left_count0, %left_index0
  %left_tail_bytes0 = mul i64 %left_remaining0, 24
  %left_tail_src_offset0 = mul i64 %left_index0, 24
  %left_tail_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_tail_src_offset0
  %left_tail_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %left_tail_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %left_tail_dest_offset0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %left_tail_dest0, ptr %left_tail_src0, i64 %left_tail_bytes0, i1 false)
  %left_tail_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, %left_remaining0
  store i64 %left_tail_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_done

compare_keys:
  %left_offset0 = mul i64 %left_index0, 24
  %left_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_offset0
  %left_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %left_entry_ptr0
  %left_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %left_entry0, 0
  %right_offset0 = mul i64 %right_index0, 24
  %right_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_offset0
  %right_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %right_entry_ptr0
  %right_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, 0
  %left_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %left_key0, 0
  %left_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %left_key0, 1
  %right_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %right_key0, 0
  %right_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %right_key0, 1
  %left_key_shorter0 = icmp ult i64 %left_key_count0, %right_key_count0
  %min_key_count0 = select i1 %left_key_shorter0, i64 %left_key_count0, i64 %right_key_count0
  %min_key_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %min_key_count0, 0
  br i1 %min_key_empty0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_compare

key_bytes_compare:
  %key_cmp0 = call i32 @memcmp(ptr %left_key_data0, ptr %right_key_data0, i64 %min_key_count0)
  %key_bytes_equal0 = icmp eq i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %key_bytes_equal0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_ordered

key_bytes_ordered:
  %left_key_bytes_less0 = icmp slt i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %left_key_bytes_less0, label %take_left, label %take_right

key_bytes_equal_prefix:
  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i64 %left_key_count0, %right_key_count0
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %shared_key, label %key_prefix_not_equal

key_prefix_not_equal:
  br i1 %left_key_shorter0, label %take_left, label %take_right

take_left:
  %take_left_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %take_left_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %take_left_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %left_entry0, ptr %take_left_out_ptr0
  %take_left_next0 = add i64 %left_index0, 1
  %take_left_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %take_left_next0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 %take_left_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

take_right:
  %take_right_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %take_right_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %take_right_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, ptr %take_right_out_ptr0
  %take_right_next0 = add i64 %right_index0, 1
  %take_right_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %take_right_next0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 %take_right_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

shared_key:
  %shared_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %shared_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %shared_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %left_entry0, ptr %shared_out_ptr0
  %shared_left_next0 = add i64 %left_index0, 1
  %shared_right_next0 = add i64 %right_index0, 1
  %shared_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %shared_left_next0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 %shared_right_next0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 %shared_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

merge_done:
  %merged_count0 = load i64, ptr %out_index_slot
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %merged_count0, 1
  ret { ptr, i64 } %carrier1
}

define { ptr, i64 } @evid$map_merge_using_right_bindings_for_shared_keys$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0, { ptr, i64 } %arg1) {
entry:
  %left_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %left_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %right_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %right_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 1
  %max_count0 = add i64 %left_count0, %right_count0
  %result_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %max_count0, 0
  br i1 %result_empty0, label %return_empty, label %allocate

return_empty:
  ret { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer

allocate:
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %max_count0, 24
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  %left_index_slot = alloca i64
  %right_index_slot = alloca i64
  %out_index_slot = alloca i64
  store i64 0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

merge_loop:
  %left_index0 = load i64, ptr %left_index_slot
  %right_index0 = load i64, ptr %right_index_slot
  %out_index0 = load i64, ptr %out_index_slot
  %left_done0 = icmp eq i64 %left_index0, %left_count0
  br i1 %left_done0, label %left_exhausted, label %left_available

left_exhausted:
  %right_done0 = icmp eq i64 %right_index0, %right_count0
  br i1 %right_done0, label %merge_done, label %copy_right_tail

left_available:
  %right_done1 = icmp eq i64 %right_index0, %right_count0
  br i1 %right_done1, label %copy_left_tail, label %compare_keys

copy_right_tail:
  %right_remaining0 = sub i64 %right_count0, %right_index0
  %right_tail_bytes0 = mul i64 %right_remaining0, 24
  %right_tail_src_offset0 = mul i64 %right_index0, 24
  %right_tail_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_tail_src_offset0
  %right_tail_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %right_tail_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %right_tail_dest_offset0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %right_tail_dest0, ptr %right_tail_src0, i64 %right_tail_bytes0, i1 false)
  %right_tail_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, %right_remaining0
  store i64 %right_tail_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_done

copy_left_tail:
  %left_remaining0 = sub i64 %left_count0, %left_index0
  %left_tail_bytes0 = mul i64 %left_remaining0, 24
  %left_tail_src_offset0 = mul i64 %left_index0, 24
  %left_tail_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_tail_src_offset0
  %left_tail_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %left_tail_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %left_tail_dest_offset0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %left_tail_dest0, ptr %left_tail_src0, i64 %left_tail_bytes0, i1 false)
  %left_tail_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, %left_remaining0
  store i64 %left_tail_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_done

compare_keys:
  %left_offset0 = mul i64 %left_index0, 24
  %left_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_offset0
  %left_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %left_entry_ptr0
  %left_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %left_entry0, 0
  %right_offset0 = mul i64 %right_index0, 24
  %right_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_offset0
  %right_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %right_entry_ptr0
  %right_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, 0
  %left_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %left_key0, 0
  %left_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %left_key0, 1
  %right_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %right_key0, 0
  %right_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %right_key0, 1
  %left_key_shorter0 = icmp ult i64 %left_key_count0, %right_key_count0
  %min_key_count0 = select i1 %left_key_shorter0, i64 %left_key_count0, i64 %right_key_count0
  %min_key_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %min_key_count0, 0
  br i1 %min_key_empty0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_compare

key_bytes_compare:
  %key_cmp0 = call i32 @memcmp(ptr %left_key_data0, ptr %right_key_data0, i64 %min_key_count0)
  %key_bytes_equal0 = icmp eq i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %key_bytes_equal0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_ordered

key_bytes_ordered:
  %left_key_bytes_less0 = icmp slt i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %left_key_bytes_less0, label %take_left, label %take_right

key_bytes_equal_prefix:
  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i64 %left_key_count0, %right_key_count0
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %shared_key, label %key_prefix_not_equal

key_prefix_not_equal:
  br i1 %left_key_shorter0, label %take_left, label %take_right

take_left:
  %take_left_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %take_left_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %take_left_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %left_entry0, ptr %take_left_out_ptr0
  %take_left_next0 = add i64 %left_index0, 1
  %take_left_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %take_left_next0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 %take_left_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

take_right:
  %take_right_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %take_right_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %take_right_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, ptr %take_right_out_ptr0
  %take_right_next0 = add i64 %right_index0, 1
  %take_right_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %take_right_next0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 %take_right_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

shared_key:
  %shared_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %shared_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %shared_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, ptr %shared_out_ptr0
  %shared_left_next0 = add i64 %left_index0, 1
  %shared_right_next0 = add i64 %right_index0, 1
  %shared_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %shared_left_next0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 %shared_right_next0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 %shared_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

merge_done:
  %merged_count0 = load i64, ptr %out_index_slot
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %merged_count0, 1
  ret { ptr, i64 } %carrier1
}

define { ptr, i64 } @evid$map_merge_left_nonempty_using_right_bindings_for_shared_keys$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0, { ptr, i64 } %arg1) {
entry:
  %left_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %left_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %right_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %right_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 1
  %max_count0 = add i64 %left_count0, %right_count0
  %result_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %max_count0, 0
  br i1 %result_empty0, label %return_empty, label %allocate

return_empty:
  ret { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer

allocate:
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %max_count0, 24
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  %left_index_slot = alloca i64
  %right_index_slot = alloca i64
  %out_index_slot = alloca i64
  store i64 0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

merge_loop:
  %left_index0 = load i64, ptr %left_index_slot
  %right_index0 = load i64, ptr %right_index_slot
  %out_index0 = load i64, ptr %out_index_slot
  %left_done0 = icmp eq i64 %left_index0, %left_count0
  br i1 %left_done0, label %left_exhausted, label %left_available

left_exhausted:
  %right_done0 = icmp eq i64 %right_index0, %right_count0
  br i1 %right_done0, label %merge_done, label %copy_right_tail

left_available:
  %right_done1 = icmp eq i64 %right_index0, %right_count0
  br i1 %right_done1, label %copy_left_tail, label %compare_keys

copy_right_tail:
  %right_remaining0 = sub i64 %right_count0, %right_index0
  %right_tail_bytes0 = mul i64 %right_remaining0, 24
  %right_tail_src_offset0 = mul i64 %right_index0, 24
  %right_tail_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_tail_src_offset0
  %right_tail_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %right_tail_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %right_tail_dest_offset0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %right_tail_dest0, ptr %right_tail_src0, i64 %right_tail_bytes0, i1 false)
  %right_tail_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, %right_remaining0
  store i64 %right_tail_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_done

copy_left_tail:
  %left_remaining0 = sub i64 %left_count0, %left_index0
  %left_tail_bytes0 = mul i64 %left_remaining0, 24
  %left_tail_src_offset0 = mul i64 %left_index0, 24
  %left_tail_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_tail_src_offset0
  %left_tail_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %left_tail_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %left_tail_dest_offset0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %left_tail_dest0, ptr %left_tail_src0, i64 %left_tail_bytes0, i1 false)
  %left_tail_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, %left_remaining0
  store i64 %left_tail_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_done

compare_keys:
  %left_offset0 = mul i64 %left_index0, 24
  %left_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_offset0
  %left_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %left_entry_ptr0
  %left_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %left_entry0, 0
  %right_offset0 = mul i64 %right_index0, 24
  %right_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_offset0
  %right_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %right_entry_ptr0
  %right_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, 0
  %left_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %left_key0, 0
  %left_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %left_key0, 1
  %right_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %right_key0, 0
  %right_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %right_key0, 1
  %left_key_shorter0 = icmp ult i64 %left_key_count0, %right_key_count0
  %min_key_count0 = select i1 %left_key_shorter0, i64 %left_key_count0, i64 %right_key_count0
  %min_key_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %min_key_count0, 0
  br i1 %min_key_empty0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_compare

key_bytes_compare:
  %key_cmp0 = call i32 @memcmp(ptr %left_key_data0, ptr %right_key_data0, i64 %min_key_count0)
  %key_bytes_equal0 = icmp eq i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %key_bytes_equal0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_ordered

key_bytes_ordered:
  %left_key_bytes_less0 = icmp slt i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %left_key_bytes_less0, label %take_left, label %take_right

key_bytes_equal_prefix:
  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i64 %left_key_count0, %right_key_count0
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %shared_key, label %key_prefix_not_equal

key_prefix_not_equal:
  br i1 %left_key_shorter0, label %take_left, label %take_right

take_left:
  %take_left_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %take_left_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %take_left_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %left_entry0, ptr %take_left_out_ptr0
  %take_left_next0 = add i64 %left_index0, 1
  %take_left_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %take_left_next0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 %take_left_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

take_right:
  %take_right_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %take_right_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %take_right_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, ptr %take_right_out_ptr0
  %take_right_next0 = add i64 %right_index0, 1
  %take_right_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %take_right_next0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 %take_right_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

shared_key:
  %shared_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %shared_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %shared_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, ptr %shared_out_ptr0
  %shared_left_next0 = add i64 %left_index0, 1
  %shared_right_next0 = add i64 %right_index0, 1
  %shared_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %shared_left_next0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 %shared_right_next0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 %shared_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

merge_done:
  %merged_count0 = load i64, ptr %out_index_slot
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %merged_count0, 1
  ret { ptr, i64 } %carrier1
}

define { ptr, i64 } @evid$map_merge_right_nonempty_using_right_bindings_for_shared_keys$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0, { ptr, i64 } %arg1) {
entry:
  %left_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %left_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %right_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %right_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 1
  %max_count0 = add i64 %left_count0, %right_count0
  %result_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %max_count0, 0
  br i1 %result_empty0, label %return_empty, label %allocate

return_empty:
  ret { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer

allocate:
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %max_count0, 24
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  %left_index_slot = alloca i64
  %right_index_slot = alloca i64
  %out_index_slot = alloca i64
  store i64 0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

merge_loop:
  %left_index0 = load i64, ptr %left_index_slot
  %right_index0 = load i64, ptr %right_index_slot
  %out_index0 = load i64, ptr %out_index_slot
  %left_done0 = icmp eq i64 %left_index0, %left_count0
  br i1 %left_done0, label %left_exhausted, label %left_available

left_exhausted:
  %right_done0 = icmp eq i64 %right_index0, %right_count0
  br i1 %right_done0, label %merge_done, label %copy_right_tail

left_available:
  %right_done1 = icmp eq i64 %right_index0, %right_count0
  br i1 %right_done1, label %copy_left_tail, label %compare_keys

copy_right_tail:
  %right_remaining0 = sub i64 %right_count0, %right_index0
  %right_tail_bytes0 = mul i64 %right_remaining0, 24
  %right_tail_src_offset0 = mul i64 %right_index0, 24
  %right_tail_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_tail_src_offset0
  %right_tail_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %right_tail_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %right_tail_dest_offset0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %right_tail_dest0, ptr %right_tail_src0, i64 %right_tail_bytes0, i1 false)
  %right_tail_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, %right_remaining0
  store i64 %right_tail_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_done

copy_left_tail:
  %left_remaining0 = sub i64 %left_count0, %left_index0
  %left_tail_bytes0 = mul i64 %left_remaining0, 24
  %left_tail_src_offset0 = mul i64 %left_index0, 24
  %left_tail_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_tail_src_offset0
  %left_tail_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %left_tail_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %left_tail_dest_offset0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %left_tail_dest0, ptr %left_tail_src0, i64 %left_tail_bytes0, i1 false)
  %left_tail_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, %left_remaining0
  store i64 %left_tail_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_done

compare_keys:
  %left_offset0 = mul i64 %left_index0, 24
  %left_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_offset0
  %left_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %left_entry_ptr0
  %left_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %left_entry0, 0
  %right_offset0 = mul i64 %right_index0, 24
  %right_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_offset0
  %right_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %right_entry_ptr0
  %right_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, 0
  %left_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %left_key0, 0
  %left_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %left_key0, 1
  %right_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %right_key0, 0
  %right_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %right_key0, 1
  %left_key_shorter0 = icmp ult i64 %left_key_count0, %right_key_count0
  %min_key_count0 = select i1 %left_key_shorter0, i64 %left_key_count0, i64 %right_key_count0
  %min_key_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %min_key_count0, 0
  br i1 %min_key_empty0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_compare

key_bytes_compare:
  %key_cmp0 = call i32 @memcmp(ptr %left_key_data0, ptr %right_key_data0, i64 %min_key_count0)
  %key_bytes_equal0 = icmp eq i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %key_bytes_equal0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_ordered

key_bytes_ordered:
  %left_key_bytes_less0 = icmp slt i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %left_key_bytes_less0, label %take_left, label %take_right

key_bytes_equal_prefix:
  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i64 %left_key_count0, %right_key_count0
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %shared_key, label %key_prefix_not_equal

key_prefix_not_equal:
  br i1 %left_key_shorter0, label %take_left, label %take_right

take_left:
  %take_left_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %take_left_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %take_left_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %left_entry0, ptr %take_left_out_ptr0
  %take_left_next0 = add i64 %left_index0, 1
  %take_left_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %take_left_next0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 %take_left_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

take_right:
  %take_right_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %take_right_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %take_right_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, ptr %take_right_out_ptr0
  %take_right_next0 = add i64 %right_index0, 1
  %take_right_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %take_right_next0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 %take_right_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

shared_key:
  %shared_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %shared_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %shared_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, ptr %shared_out_ptr0
  %shared_left_next0 = add i64 %left_index0, 1
  %shared_right_next0 = add i64 %right_index0, 1
  %shared_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %shared_left_next0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 %shared_right_next0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 %shared_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

merge_done:
  %merged_count0 = load i64, ptr %out_index_slot
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %merged_count0, 1
  ret { ptr, i64 } %carrier1
}

define { ptr, i64 } @evid$nonempty_map_merge_using_right_bindings_for_shared_keys$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0, { ptr, i64 } %arg1) {
entry:
  %left_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %left_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %right_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %right_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 1
  %max_count0 = add i64 %left_count0, %right_count0
  %result_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %max_count0, 0
  br i1 %result_empty0, label %return_empty, label %allocate

return_empty:
  ret { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer

allocate:
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %max_count0, 24
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  %left_index_slot = alloca i64
  %right_index_slot = alloca i64
  %out_index_slot = alloca i64
  store i64 0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

merge_loop:
  %left_index0 = load i64, ptr %left_index_slot
  %right_index0 = load i64, ptr %right_index_slot
  %out_index0 = load i64, ptr %out_index_slot
  %left_done0 = icmp eq i64 %left_index0, %left_count0
  br i1 %left_done0, label %left_exhausted, label %left_available

left_exhausted:
  %right_done0 = icmp eq i64 %right_index0, %right_count0
  br i1 %right_done0, label %merge_done, label %copy_right_tail

left_available:
  %right_done1 = icmp eq i64 %right_index0, %right_count0
  br i1 %right_done1, label %copy_left_tail, label %compare_keys

copy_right_tail:
  %right_remaining0 = sub i64 %right_count0, %right_index0
  %right_tail_bytes0 = mul i64 %right_remaining0, 24
  %right_tail_src_offset0 = mul i64 %right_index0, 24
  %right_tail_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_tail_src_offset0
  %right_tail_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %right_tail_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %right_tail_dest_offset0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %right_tail_dest0, ptr %right_tail_src0, i64 %right_tail_bytes0, i1 false)
  %right_tail_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, %right_remaining0
  store i64 %right_tail_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_done

copy_left_tail:
  %left_remaining0 = sub i64 %left_count0, %left_index0
  %left_tail_bytes0 = mul i64 %left_remaining0, 24
  %left_tail_src_offset0 = mul i64 %left_index0, 24
  %left_tail_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_tail_src_offset0
  %left_tail_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %left_tail_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %left_tail_dest_offset0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %left_tail_dest0, ptr %left_tail_src0, i64 %left_tail_bytes0, i1 false)
  %left_tail_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, %left_remaining0
  store i64 %left_tail_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_done

compare_keys:
  %left_offset0 = mul i64 %left_index0, 24
  %left_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_offset0
  %left_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %left_entry_ptr0
  %left_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %left_entry0, 0
  %right_offset0 = mul i64 %right_index0, 24
  %right_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_offset0
  %right_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %right_entry_ptr0
  %right_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, 0
  %left_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %left_key0, 0
  %left_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %left_key0, 1
  %right_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %right_key0, 0
  %right_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %right_key0, 1
  %left_key_shorter0 = icmp ult i64 %left_key_count0, %right_key_count0
  %min_key_count0 = select i1 %left_key_shorter0, i64 %left_key_count0, i64 %right_key_count0
  %min_key_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %min_key_count0, 0
  br i1 %min_key_empty0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_compare

key_bytes_compare:
  %key_cmp0 = call i32 @memcmp(ptr %left_key_data0, ptr %right_key_data0, i64 %min_key_count0)
  %key_bytes_equal0 = icmp eq i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %key_bytes_equal0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_ordered

key_bytes_ordered:
  %left_key_bytes_less0 = icmp slt i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %left_key_bytes_less0, label %take_left, label %take_right

key_bytes_equal_prefix:
  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i64 %left_key_count0, %right_key_count0
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %shared_key, label %key_prefix_not_equal

key_prefix_not_equal:
  br i1 %left_key_shorter0, label %take_left, label %take_right

take_left:
  %take_left_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %take_left_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %take_left_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %left_entry0, ptr %take_left_out_ptr0
  %take_left_next0 = add i64 %left_index0, 1
  %take_left_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %take_left_next0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 %take_left_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

take_right:
  %take_right_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %take_right_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %take_right_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, ptr %take_right_out_ptr0
  %take_right_next0 = add i64 %right_index0, 1
  %take_right_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %take_right_next0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 %take_right_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

shared_key:
  %shared_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 24
  %shared_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %shared_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %right_entry0, ptr %shared_out_ptr0
  %shared_left_next0 = add i64 %left_index0, 1
  %shared_right_next0 = add i64 %right_index0, 1
  %shared_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %shared_left_next0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 %shared_right_next0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 %shared_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

merge_done:
  %merged_count0 = load i64, ptr %out_index_slot
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %merged_count0, 1
  ret { ptr, i64 } %carrier1
}

define { ptr, i64 } @evid$map_merge_using_right_bindings_for_shared_keys$Int$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0, { ptr, i64 } %arg1) {
entry:
  %left_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %left_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %right_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %right_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 1
  %max_count0 = add i64 %left_count0, %right_count0
  %result_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %max_count0, 0
  br i1 %result_empty0, label %return_empty, label %allocate

return_empty:
  ret { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer

allocate:
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %max_count0, 16
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  %left_index_slot = alloca i64
  %right_index_slot = alloca i64
  %out_index_slot = alloca i64
  store i64 0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

merge_loop:
  %left_index0 = load i64, ptr %left_index_slot
  %right_index0 = load i64, ptr %right_index_slot
  %out_index0 = load i64, ptr %out_index_slot
  %left_done0 = icmp eq i64 %left_index0, %left_count0
  br i1 %left_done0, label %left_exhausted, label %left_available

left_exhausted:
  %right_done0 = icmp eq i64 %right_index0, %right_count0
  br i1 %right_done0, label %merge_done, label %copy_right_tail

left_available:
  %right_done1 = icmp eq i64 %right_index0, %right_count0
  br i1 %right_done1, label %copy_left_tail, label %compare_keys

copy_right_tail:
  %right_remaining0 = sub i64 %right_count0, %right_index0
  %right_tail_bytes0 = mul i64 %right_remaining0, 16
  %right_tail_src_offset0 = mul i64 %right_index0, 16
  %right_tail_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_tail_src_offset0
  %right_tail_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 16
  %right_tail_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %right_tail_dest_offset0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %right_tail_dest0, ptr %right_tail_src0, i64 %right_tail_bytes0, i1 false)
  %right_tail_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, %right_remaining0
  store i64 %right_tail_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_done

copy_left_tail:
  %left_remaining0 = sub i64 %left_count0, %left_index0
  %left_tail_bytes0 = mul i64 %left_remaining0, 16
  %left_tail_src_offset0 = mul i64 %left_index0, 16
  %left_tail_src0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_tail_src_offset0
  %left_tail_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 16
  %left_tail_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %left_tail_dest_offset0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %left_tail_dest0, ptr %left_tail_src0, i64 %left_tail_bytes0, i1 false)
  %left_tail_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, %left_remaining0
  store i64 %left_tail_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_done

compare_keys:
  %left_offset0 = mul i64 %left_index0, 16
  %left_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_offset0
  %left_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Int__Int_, ptr %left_entry_ptr0
  %left_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Int__Int_ %left_entry0, 0
  %right_offset0 = mul i64 %right_index0, 16
  %right_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_offset0
  %right_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Int__Int_, ptr %right_entry_ptr0
  %right_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Int__Int_ %right_entry0, 0
  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i64 %left_key0, %right_key0
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %shared_key, label %key_not_equal

key_not_equal:
  %left_key_less0 = icmp slt i64 %left_key0, %right_key0
  br i1 %left_key_less0, label %take_left, label %take_right

take_left:
  %take_left_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 16
  %take_left_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %take_left_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Int__Int_ %left_entry0, ptr %take_left_out_ptr0
  %take_left_next0 = add i64 %left_index0, 1
  %take_left_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %take_left_next0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 %take_left_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

take_right:
  %take_right_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 16
  %take_right_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %take_right_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Int__Int_ %right_entry0, ptr %take_right_out_ptr0
  %take_right_next0 = add i64 %right_index0, 1
  %take_right_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %take_right_next0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 %take_right_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

shared_key:
  %shared_out_offset0 = mul i64 %out_index0, 16
  %shared_out_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %shared_out_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Int__Int_ %right_entry0, ptr %shared_out_ptr0
  %shared_left_next0 = add i64 %left_index0, 1
  %shared_right_next0 = add i64 %right_index0, 1
  %shared_out_next0 = add i64 %out_index0, 1
  store i64 %shared_left_next0, ptr %left_index_slot
  store i64 %shared_right_next0, ptr %right_index_slot
  store i64 %shared_out_next0, ptr %out_index_slot
  br label %merge_loop

merge_done:
  %merged_count0 = load i64, ptr %out_index_slot
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %merged_count0, 1
  ret { ptr, i64 } %carrier1
}

define { ptr, i64 } @evid$nonempty_list_concat$MapEntry_Text__Int_({ ptr, i64 } %arg0, { ptr, i64 } %arg1) {
entry:
  %left_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %left_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %right_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %right_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 1
  %new_count0 = add i64 %left_count0, %right_count0
  %left_bytes0 = mul i64 %left_count0, 24
  %right_bytes0 = mul i64 %right_count0, 24
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %new_count0, 24
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %data0, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_bytes0, i1 false)
  %right_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %left_bytes0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %right_dest0, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_bytes0, i1 false)
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %new_count0, 1
  ret { ptr, i64 } %carrier1
}

define { ptr, i64 } @evid$nonempty_map_entries_copy$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0) {
entry:
  ret { ptr, i64 } %arg0
}

define { ptr, i64 } @evid$nonempty_list_concat$MapEntry_Int__Int_({ ptr, i64 } %arg0, { ptr, i64 } %arg1) {
entry:
  %left_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %left_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %right_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %right_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 1
  %new_count0 = add i64 %left_count0, %right_count0
  %left_bytes0 = mul i64 %left_count0, 16
  %right_bytes0 = mul i64 %right_count0, 16
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %new_count0, 16
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %data0, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_bytes0, i1 false)
  %right_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %left_bytes0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %right_dest0, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_bytes0, i1 false)
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %new_count0, 1
  ret { ptr, i64 } %carrier1
}

define { ptr, i64 } @evid$nonempty_map_entries_copy$Int$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0) {
entry:
  ret { ptr, i64 } %arg0
}

define { ptr, i64 } @evid$map_from_entries_using_first_bindings$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0) {
entry:
  %input_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %input_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %input_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %input_count0, 0
  br i1 %input_empty0, label %return_empty, label %allocate

return_empty:
  ret { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer

allocate:
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %input_count0, 24
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  %input_index_slot = alloca i64
  %out_count_slot = alloca i64
  %scan_index_slot = alloca i64
  %insert_index_slot = alloca i64
  %shift_index_slot = alloca i64
  store i64 0, ptr %input_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %out_count_slot
  br label %process_next

process_next:
  %input_index0 = load i64, ptr %input_index_slot
  %input_done0 = icmp eq i64 %input_index0, %input_count0
  br i1 %input_done0, label %done, label %load_input

load_input:
  %input_offset0 = mul i64 %input_index0, 24
  %input_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %input_data0, i64 %input_offset0
  %current_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %input_entry_ptr0
  %current_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %current_entry0, 0
  store i64 0, ptr %scan_index_slot
  br label %scan_output

scan_output:
  %scan_index0 = load i64, ptr %scan_index_slot
  %out_count0 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  %scan_done0 = icmp eq i64 %scan_index0, %out_count0
  br i1 %scan_done0, label %insert_current, label %compare_existing

compare_existing:
  %output_offset0 = mul i64 %scan_index0, 24
  %existing_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %output_offset0
  %existing_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %existing_entry_ptr0
  %existing_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %existing_entry0, 0
  %current_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %current_key0, 0
  %current_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %current_key0, 1
  %existing_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %existing_key0, 0
  %existing_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %existing_key0, 1
  %current_key_shorter0 = icmp ult i64 %current_key_count0, %existing_key_count0
  %min_key_count0 = select i1 %current_key_shorter0, i64 %current_key_count0, i64 %existing_key_count0
  %min_key_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %min_key_count0, 0
  br i1 %min_key_empty0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_compare

key_bytes_compare:
  %key_cmp0 = call i32 @memcmp(ptr %current_key_data0, ptr %existing_key_data0, i64 %min_key_count0)
  %key_bytes_equal0 = icmp eq i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %key_bytes_equal0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_ordered

key_bytes_ordered:
  %current_key_bytes_less0 = icmp slt i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %current_key_bytes_less0, label %insert_current, label %scan_next

key_bytes_equal_prefix:
  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i64 %current_key_count0, %existing_key_count0
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %duplicate_key, label %key_prefix_not_equal

key_prefix_not_equal:
  br i1 %current_key_shorter0, label %insert_current, label %scan_next

scan_next:
  %scan_next0 = add i64 %scan_index0, 1
  store i64 %scan_next0, ptr %scan_index_slot
  br label %scan_output

duplicate_key:
  br label %next_input

insert_current:
  %insert_index0 = load i64, ptr %scan_index_slot
  %out_count1 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  store i64 %insert_index0, ptr %insert_index_slot
  %suffix_count0 = sub i64 %out_count1, %insert_index0
  %suffix_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %suffix_count0, 0
  br i1 %suffix_empty0, label %store_current, label %shift_setup

shift_setup:
  store i64 %out_count1, ptr %shift_index_slot
  br label %shift_loop

shift_loop:
  %shift_index0 = load i64, ptr %shift_index_slot
  %insert_index1 = load i64, ptr %insert_index_slot
  %shift_done0 = icmp eq i64 %shift_index0, %insert_index1
  br i1 %shift_done0, label %store_current, label %shift_one

shift_one:
  %shift_source_index0 = sub i64 %shift_index0, 1
  %shift_source_offset0 = mul i64 %shift_source_index0, 24
  %shift_source_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %shift_source_offset0
  %shift_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %shift_source_ptr0
  %shift_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %shift_index0, 24
  %shift_dest_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %shift_dest_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %shift_entry0, ptr %shift_dest_ptr0
  store i64 %shift_source_index0, ptr %shift_index_slot
  br label %shift_loop

store_current:
  %insert_index2 = load i64, ptr %insert_index_slot
  %insert_offset0 = mul i64 %insert_index2, 24
  %insert_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %insert_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %current_entry0, ptr %insert_ptr0
  %out_count2 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  %new_out_count0 = add i64 %out_count2, 1
  store i64 %new_out_count0, ptr %out_count_slot
  br label %next_input

next_input:
  %input_index1 = load i64, ptr %input_index_slot
  %input_next0 = add i64 %input_index1, 1
  store i64 %input_next0, ptr %input_index_slot
  br label %process_next

done:
  %final_count0 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %final_count0, 1
  ret { ptr, i64 } %carrier1
}

define { ptr, i64 } @evid$list_empty$MapEntry_Text__Int_() {
entry:
  ret { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer
}

define %evid.yield.map_from_entries_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int @evid$map_from_entries_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0) {
entry:
  %input_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %input_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %input_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %input_count0, 0
  br i1 %input_empty0, label %return_empty, label %allocate

return_empty:
  %ok_empty.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_from_entries_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 0, 0
  %ok_empty.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %ok_empty.pack.slot
  store { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %ok_empty.pack.slot
  %ok_empty.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %ok_empty.pack.slot
  %ok_empty.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_from_entries_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %ok_empty.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %ok_empty.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.map_from_entries_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %ok_empty.value

allocate:
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %input_count0, 24
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  %input_index_slot = alloca i64
  %out_count_slot = alloca i64
  %scan_index_slot = alloca i64
  %insert_index_slot = alloca i64
  %shift_index_slot = alloca i64
  store i64 0, ptr %input_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %out_count_slot
  br label %process_next

process_next:
  %input_index0 = load i64, ptr %input_index_slot
  %input_done0 = icmp eq i64 %input_index0, %input_count0
  br i1 %input_done0, label %done, label %load_input

load_input:
  %input_offset0 = mul i64 %input_index0, 24
  %input_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %input_data0, i64 %input_offset0
  %current_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %input_entry_ptr0
  %current_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %current_entry0, 0
  store i64 0, ptr %scan_index_slot
  br label %scan_output

scan_output:
  %scan_index0 = load i64, ptr %scan_index_slot
  %out_count0 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  %scan_done0 = icmp eq i64 %scan_index0, %out_count0
  br i1 %scan_done0, label %insert_current, label %compare_existing

compare_existing:
  %output_offset0 = mul i64 %scan_index0, 24
  %existing_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %output_offset0
  %existing_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %existing_entry_ptr0
  %existing_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %existing_entry0, 0
  %current_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %current_key0, 0
  %current_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %current_key0, 1
  %existing_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %existing_key0, 0
  %existing_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %existing_key0, 1
  %current_key_shorter0 = icmp ult i64 %current_key_count0, %existing_key_count0
  %min_key_count0 = select i1 %current_key_shorter0, i64 %current_key_count0, i64 %existing_key_count0
  %min_key_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %min_key_count0, 0
  br i1 %min_key_empty0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_compare

key_bytes_compare:
  %key_cmp0 = call i32 @memcmp(ptr %current_key_data0, ptr %existing_key_data0, i64 %min_key_count0)
  %key_bytes_equal0 = icmp eq i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %key_bytes_equal0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_ordered

key_bytes_ordered:
  %current_key_bytes_less0 = icmp slt i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %current_key_bytes_less0, label %insert_current, label %scan_next

key_bytes_equal_prefix:
  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i64 %current_key_count0, %existing_key_count0
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %duplicate_key, label %key_prefix_not_equal

key_prefix_not_equal:
  br i1 %current_key_shorter0, label %insert_current, label %scan_next

scan_next:
  %scan_next0 = add i64 %scan_index0, 1
  store i64 %scan_next0, ptr %scan_index_slot
  br label %scan_output

duplicate_key:
  %reason0 = insertvalue %evid.type.MapMergeFailure zeroinitializer, i32 4, 0
  %fail.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_from_entries_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 1, 0
  %fail.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  store %evid.type.MapMergeFailure %reason0, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_from_entries_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %fail.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %fail.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.map_from_entries_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %fail.value

insert_current:
  %insert_index0 = load i64, ptr %scan_index_slot
  %out_count1 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  store i64 %insert_index0, ptr %insert_index_slot
  %suffix_count0 = sub i64 %out_count1, %insert_index0
  %suffix_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %suffix_count0, 0
  br i1 %suffix_empty0, label %store_current, label %shift_setup

shift_setup:
  store i64 %out_count1, ptr %shift_index_slot
  br label %shift_loop

shift_loop:
  %shift_index0 = load i64, ptr %shift_index_slot
  %insert_index1 = load i64, ptr %insert_index_slot
  %shift_done0 = icmp eq i64 %shift_index0, %insert_index1
  br i1 %shift_done0, label %store_current, label %shift_one

shift_one:
  %shift_source_index0 = sub i64 %shift_index0, 1
  %shift_source_offset0 = mul i64 %shift_source_index0, 24
  %shift_source_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %shift_source_offset0
  %shift_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %shift_source_ptr0
  %shift_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %shift_index0, 24
  %shift_dest_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %shift_dest_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %shift_entry0, ptr %shift_dest_ptr0
  store i64 %shift_source_index0, ptr %shift_index_slot
  br label %shift_loop

store_current:
  %insert_index2 = load i64, ptr %insert_index_slot
  %insert_offset0 = mul i64 %insert_index2, 24
  %insert_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %insert_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %current_entry0, ptr %insert_ptr0
  %out_count2 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  %new_out_count0 = add i64 %out_count2, 1
  store i64 %new_out_count0, ptr %out_count_slot
  br label %next_input

next_input:
  %input_index1 = load i64, ptr %input_index_slot
  %input_next0 = add i64 %input_index1, 1
  store i64 %input_next0, ptr %input_index_slot
  br label %process_next

done:
  %final_count0 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %final_count0, 1
  %ok.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_from_entries_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 0, 0
  %ok.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  store { ptr, i64 } %carrier1, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.map_from_entries_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %ok.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %ok.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.map_from_entries_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %ok.value
}

define { ptr, i64 } @evid$nonempty_list_widen$MapEntry_Text__Int_({ ptr, i64 } %arg0) {
entry:
  ret { ptr, i64 } %arg0
}

define %evid.yield.nonempty_map_from_entries_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int @evid$nonempty_map_from_entries_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0) {
entry:
  %input_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %input_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %input_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %input_count0, 0
  br i1 %input_empty0, label %return_empty, label %allocate

return_empty:
  %ok_empty.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_from_entries_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 0, 0
  %ok_empty.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %ok_empty.pack.slot
  store { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %ok_empty.pack.slot
  %ok_empty.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %ok_empty.pack.slot
  %ok_empty.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_from_entries_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %ok_empty.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %ok_empty.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.nonempty_map_from_entries_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %ok_empty.value

allocate:
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %input_count0, 24
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  %input_index_slot = alloca i64
  %out_count_slot = alloca i64
  %scan_index_slot = alloca i64
  %insert_index_slot = alloca i64
  %shift_index_slot = alloca i64
  store i64 0, ptr %input_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %out_count_slot
  br label %process_next

process_next:
  %input_index0 = load i64, ptr %input_index_slot
  %input_done0 = icmp eq i64 %input_index0, %input_count0
  br i1 %input_done0, label %done, label %load_input

load_input:
  %input_offset0 = mul i64 %input_index0, 24
  %input_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %input_data0, i64 %input_offset0
  %current_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %input_entry_ptr0
  %current_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %current_entry0, 0
  store i64 0, ptr %scan_index_slot
  br label %scan_output

scan_output:
  %scan_index0 = load i64, ptr %scan_index_slot
  %out_count0 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  %scan_done0 = icmp eq i64 %scan_index0, %out_count0
  br i1 %scan_done0, label %insert_current, label %compare_existing

compare_existing:
  %output_offset0 = mul i64 %scan_index0, 24
  %existing_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %output_offset0
  %existing_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %existing_entry_ptr0
  %existing_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %existing_entry0, 0
  %current_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %current_key0, 0
  %current_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %current_key0, 1
  %existing_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %existing_key0, 0
  %existing_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %existing_key0, 1
  %current_key_shorter0 = icmp ult i64 %current_key_count0, %existing_key_count0
  %min_key_count0 = select i1 %current_key_shorter0, i64 %current_key_count0, i64 %existing_key_count0
  %min_key_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %min_key_count0, 0
  br i1 %min_key_empty0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_compare

key_bytes_compare:
  %key_cmp0 = call i32 @memcmp(ptr %current_key_data0, ptr %existing_key_data0, i64 %min_key_count0)
  %key_bytes_equal0 = icmp eq i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %key_bytes_equal0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_ordered

key_bytes_ordered:
  %current_key_bytes_less0 = icmp slt i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %current_key_bytes_less0, label %insert_current, label %scan_next

key_bytes_equal_prefix:
  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i64 %current_key_count0, %existing_key_count0
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %duplicate_key, label %key_prefix_not_equal

key_prefix_not_equal:
  br i1 %current_key_shorter0, label %insert_current, label %scan_next

scan_next:
  %scan_next0 = add i64 %scan_index0, 1
  store i64 %scan_next0, ptr %scan_index_slot
  br label %scan_output

duplicate_key:
  %reason0 = insertvalue %evid.type.MapMergeFailure zeroinitializer, i32 4, 0
  %fail.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_from_entries_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 1, 0
  %fail.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  store %evid.type.MapMergeFailure %reason0, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_from_entries_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %fail.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %fail.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.nonempty_map_from_entries_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %fail.value

insert_current:
  %insert_index0 = load i64, ptr %scan_index_slot
  %out_count1 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  store i64 %insert_index0, ptr %insert_index_slot
  %suffix_count0 = sub i64 %out_count1, %insert_index0
  %suffix_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %suffix_count0, 0
  br i1 %suffix_empty0, label %store_current, label %shift_setup

shift_setup:
  store i64 %out_count1, ptr %shift_index_slot
  br label %shift_loop

shift_loop:
  %shift_index0 = load i64, ptr %shift_index_slot
  %insert_index1 = load i64, ptr %insert_index_slot
  %shift_done0 = icmp eq i64 %shift_index0, %insert_index1
  br i1 %shift_done0, label %store_current, label %shift_one

shift_one:
  %shift_source_index0 = sub i64 %shift_index0, 1
  %shift_source_offset0 = mul i64 %shift_source_index0, 24
  %shift_source_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %shift_source_offset0
  %shift_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %shift_source_ptr0
  %shift_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %shift_index0, 24
  %shift_dest_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %shift_dest_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %shift_entry0, ptr %shift_dest_ptr0
  store i64 %shift_source_index0, ptr %shift_index_slot
  br label %shift_loop

store_current:
  %insert_index2 = load i64, ptr %insert_index_slot
  %insert_offset0 = mul i64 %insert_index2, 24
  %insert_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %insert_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %current_entry0, ptr %insert_ptr0
  %out_count2 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  %new_out_count0 = add i64 %out_count2, 1
  store i64 %new_out_count0, ptr %out_count_slot
  br label %next_input

next_input:
  %input_index1 = load i64, ptr %input_index_slot
  %input_next0 = add i64 %input_index1, 1
  store i64 %input_next0, ptr %input_index_slot
  br label %process_next

done:
  %final_count0 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %final_count0, 1
  %ok.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_from_entries_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int zeroinitializer, i8 0, 0
  %ok.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  store { ptr, i64 } %carrier1, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.nonempty_map_from_entries_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %ok.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %ok.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.nonempty_map_from_entries_rejecting_shared_keys$Text$Int %ok.value
}

define { ptr, i64 } @evid$nonempty_map_from_entries_using_first_bindings$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0) {
entry:

  %input_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1

  br i1 %input_empty0, label %return_empty, label %allocate

return_empty:
  ret { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer

  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  %input_index_slot = alloca i64
  %out_count_slot = alloca i64

  %insert_index_slot = alloca i64
  %shift_index_slot = alloca i64
  store i64 0, ptr %input_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %out_count_slot
  br label %process_next

process_next:
  %input_index0 = load i64, ptr %input_index_slot
  %input_done0 = icmp eq i64 %input_index0, %input_count0
  br i1 %input_done0, label %done, label %load_input

load_input:
  %input_offset0 = mul i64 %input_index0, 24
  %input_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %input_data0, i64 %input_offset0
  %current_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %input_entry_ptr0
  %current_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %current_entry0, 0
  store i64 0, ptr %scan_index_slot
  br label %scan_output

scan_output:
  %scan_index0 = load i64, ptr %scan_index_slot
  %out_count0 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  %scan_done0 = icmp eq i64 %scan_index0, %out_count0
  br i1 %scan_done0, label %insert_current, label %compare_existing

compare_existing:
  %output_offset0 = mul i64 %scan_index0, 24
  %existing_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %output_offset0
  %existing_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %existing_entry_ptr0
  %existing_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %existing_entry0, 0
  %current_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %current_key0, 0
  %current_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %current_key0, 1
  %existing_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %existing_key0, 0
  %existing_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %existing_key0, 1
  %current_key_shorter0 = icmp ult i64 %current_key_count0, %existing_key_count0
  %min_key_count0 = select i1 %current_key_shorter0, i64 %current_key_count0, i64 %existing_key_count0
  %min_key_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %min_key_count0, 0
  br i1 %min_key_empty0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_compare

key_bytes_compare:
  %key_cmp0 = call i32 @memcmp(ptr %current_key_data0, ptr %existing_key_data0, i64 %min_key_count0)
  %key_bytes_equal0 = icmp eq i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %key_bytes_equal0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_ordered

key_bytes_ordered:
  %current_key_bytes_less0 = icmp slt i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %current_key_bytes_less0, label %insert_current, label %scan_next

key_bytes_equal_prefix:
  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i64 %current_key_count0, %existing_key_count0
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %duplicate_key, label %key_prefix_not_equal

key_prefix_not_equal:
  br i1 %current_key_shorter0, label %insert_current, label %scan_next

  %scan_next0 = add i64 %scan_index0, 1
  store i64 %scan_next0, ptr %scan_index_slot
  br label %scan_output

duplicate_key:
  br label %next_input

insert_current:
  %insert_index0 = load i64, ptr %scan_index_slot
  %out_count1 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  store i64 %insert_index0, ptr %insert_index_slot
  %suffix_count0 = sub i64 %out_count1, %insert_index0
  %suffix_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %suffix_count0, 0
  br i1 %suffix_empty0, label %store_current, label %shift_setup

shift_setup:
  store i64 %out_count1, ptr %shift_index_slot
  br label %shift_loop

shift_loop:
  %shift_index0 = load i64, ptr %shift_index_slot
  %insert_index1 = load i64, ptr %insert_index_slot
  %shift_done0 = icmp eq i64 %shift_index0, %insert_index1
  br i1 %shift_done0, label %store_current, label %shift_one

shift_one:
  %shift_source_index0 = sub i64 %shift_index0, 1
  %shift_source_offset0 = mul i64 %shift_source_index0, 24
  %shift_source_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %shift_source_offset0
  %shift_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %shift_source_ptr0
  %shift_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %shift_index0, 24
  %shift_dest_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %shift_dest_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %shift_entry0, ptr %shift_dest_ptr0
  store i64 %shift_source_index0, ptr %shift_index_slot
  br label %shift_loop

store_current:
  %insert_index2 = load i64, ptr %insert_index_slot
  %insert_offset0 = mul i64 %insert_index2, 24
  %insert_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %insert_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %current_entry0, ptr %insert_ptr0
  %out_count2 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  %new_out_count0 = add i64 %out_count2, 1
  store i64 %new_out_count0, ptr %out_count_slot
  br label %next_input

next_input:
  %input_index1 = load i64, ptr %input_index_slot
  %input_next0 = add i64 %input_index1, 1
  store i64 %input_next0, ptr %input_index_slot
  br label %process_next

done:
  %final_count0 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %final_count0, 1
  ret { ptr, i64 } %carrier1
}

define { ptr, i64 } @evid$map_from_entries_using_last_bindings$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0) {
entry:

  ret { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer

  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  %input_index_slot = alloca i64
  %out_count_slot = alloca i64
  %scan_index_slot = alloca i64
  %insert_index_slot = alloca i64
  %shift_index_slot = alloca i64
  store i64 0, ptr %input_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %out_count_slot
  br label %process_next

process_next:
  %input_index0 = load i64, ptr %input_index_slot
  %input_done0 = icmp eq i64 %input_index0, %input_count0
  br i1 %input_done0, label %done, label %load_input

load_input:
  %input_offset0 = mul i64 %input_index0, 24
  %input_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %input_data0, i64 %input_offset0
  %current_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %input_entry_ptr0
  %current_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %current_entry0, 0
  store i64 0, ptr %scan_index_slot
  br label %scan_output

scan_output:
  %scan_index0 = load i64, ptr %scan_index_slot
  %out_count0 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  %scan_done0 = icmp eq i64 %scan_index0, %out_count0
  br i1 %scan_done0, label %insert_current, label %compare_existing

compare_existing:
  %output_offset0 = mul i64 %scan_index0, 24
  %existing_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %output_offset0
  %existing_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %existing_entry_ptr0
  %existing_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %existing_entry0, 0
  %current_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %current_key0, 0
  %current_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %current_key0, 1
  %existing_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %existing_key0, 0
  %existing_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %existing_key0, 1
  %current_key_shorter0 = icmp ult i64 %current_key_count0, %existing_key_count0
  %min_key_count0 = select i1 %current_key_shorter0, i64 %current_key_count0, i64 %existing_key_count0
  %min_key_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %min_key_count0, 0
  br i1 %min_key_empty0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_compare

key_bytes_compare:
  %key_cmp0 = call i32 @memcmp(ptr %current_key_data0, ptr %existing_key_data0, i64 %min_key_count0)
  %key_bytes_equal0 = icmp eq i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %key_bytes_equal0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_ordered

key_bytes_ordered:
  %current_key_bytes_less0 = icmp slt i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %current_key_bytes_less0, label %insert_current, label %scan_next

key_bytes_equal_prefix:
  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i64 %current_key_count0, %existing_key_count0
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %duplicate_key, label %key_prefix_not_equal

key_prefix_not_equal:
  br i1 %current_key_shorter0, label %insert_current, label %scan_next

scan_next:
  %scan_next0 = add i64 %scan_index0, 1
  store i64 %scan_next0, ptr %scan_index_slot
  br label %scan_output

duplicate_key:
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %current_entry0, ptr %existing_entry_ptr0
  br label %next_input

insert_current:
  %insert_index0 = load i64, ptr %scan_index_slot
  %out_count1 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  store i64 %insert_index0, ptr %insert_index_slot
  %suffix_count0 = sub i64 %out_count1, %insert_index0
  %suffix_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %suffix_count0, 0
  br i1 %suffix_empty0, label %store_current, label %shift_setup

shift_setup:
  store i64 %out_count1, ptr %shift_index_slot
  br label %shift_loop

shift_loop:
  %shift_index0 = load i64, ptr %shift_index_slot
  %insert_index1 = load i64, ptr %insert_index_slot
  %shift_done0 = icmp eq i64 %shift_index0, %insert_index1
  br i1 %shift_done0, label %store_current, label %shift_one

shift_one:
  %shift_source_index0 = sub i64 %shift_index0, 1
  %shift_source_offset0 = mul i64 %shift_source_index0, 24
  %shift_source_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %shift_source_offset0
  %shift_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %shift_source_ptr0
  %shift_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %shift_index0, 24
  %shift_dest_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %shift_dest_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %shift_entry0, ptr %shift_dest_ptr0
  store i64 %shift_source_index0, ptr %shift_index_slot
  br label %shift_loop

store_current:
  %insert_index2 = load i64, ptr %insert_index_slot
  %insert_offset0 = mul i64 %insert_index2, 24
  %insert_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %insert_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %current_entry0, ptr %insert_ptr0
  %out_count2 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  %new_out_count0 = add i64 %out_count2, 1
  store i64 %new_out_count0, ptr %out_count_slot
  br label %next_input

next_input:
  %input_index1 = load i64, ptr %input_index_slot
  %input_next0 = add i64 %input_index1, 1
  store i64 %input_next0, ptr %input_index_slot
  br label %process_next

done:
  %final_count0 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %final_count0, 1
  ret { ptr, i64 } %carrier1
}

define { ptr, i64 } @evid$nonempty_map_from_entries_using_last_bindings$Text$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0) {
entry:
  %input_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %input_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %input_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %input_count0, 0
  br i1 %input_empty0, label %return_empty, label %allocate

return_empty:
  ret { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer

allocate:
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %input_count0, 24
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  %input_index_slot = alloca i64
  %out_count_slot = alloca i64
  %scan_index_slot = alloca i64
  %insert_index_slot = alloca i64
  %shift_index_slot = alloca i64
  store i64 0, ptr %input_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %out_count_slot
  br label %process_next

process_next:
  %input_index0 = load i64, ptr %input_index_slot
  %input_done0 = icmp eq i64 %input_index0, %input_count0
  br i1 %input_done0, label %done, label %load_input

load_input:
  %input_offset0 = mul i64 %input_index0, 24
  %input_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %input_data0, i64 %input_offset0
  %current_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %input_entry_ptr0
  %current_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %current_entry0, 0
  store i64 0, ptr %scan_index_slot
  br label %scan_output

scan_output:
  %scan_index0 = load i64, ptr %scan_index_slot
  %out_count0 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  %scan_done0 = icmp eq i64 %scan_index0, %out_count0
  br i1 %scan_done0, label %insert_current, label %compare_existing

compare_existing:
  %output_offset0 = mul i64 %scan_index0, 24
  %existing_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %output_offset0
  %existing_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %existing_entry_ptr0
  %existing_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %existing_entry0, 0
  %current_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %current_key0, 0
  %current_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %current_key0, 1
  %existing_key_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %existing_key0, 0
  %existing_key_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %existing_key0, 1
  %current_key_shorter0 = icmp ult i64 %current_key_count0, %existing_key_count0
  %min_key_count0 = select i1 %current_key_shorter0, i64 %current_key_count0, i64 %existing_key_count0
  %min_key_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %min_key_count0, 0
  br i1 %min_key_empty0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_compare

key_bytes_compare:
  %key_cmp0 = call i32 @memcmp(ptr %current_key_data0, ptr %existing_key_data0, i64 %min_key_count0)
  %key_bytes_equal0 = icmp eq i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %key_bytes_equal0, label %key_bytes_equal_prefix, label %key_bytes_ordered

key_bytes_ordered:
  %current_key_bytes_less0 = icmp slt i32 %key_cmp0, 0
  br i1 %current_key_bytes_less0, label %insert_current, label %scan_next

key_bytes_equal_prefix:
  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i64 %current_key_count0, %existing_key_count0
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %duplicate_key, label %key_prefix_not_equal

key_prefix_not_equal:
  br i1 %current_key_shorter0, label %insert_current, label %scan_next

scan_next:
  %scan_next0 = add i64 %scan_index0, 1
  store i64 %scan_next0, ptr %scan_index_slot
  br label %scan_output

duplicate_key:
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %current_entry0, ptr %existing_entry_ptr0
  br label %next_input

insert_current:
  %insert_index0 = load i64, ptr %scan_index_slot
  %out_count1 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  store i64 %insert_index0, ptr %insert_index_slot
  %suffix_count0 = sub i64 %out_count1, %insert_index0
  %suffix_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %suffix_count0, 0
  br i1 %suffix_empty0, label %store_current, label %shift_setup

shift_setup:
  store i64 %out_count1, ptr %shift_index_slot
  br label %shift_loop

shift_loop:
  %shift_index0 = load i64, ptr %shift_index_slot
  %insert_index1 = load i64, ptr %insert_index_slot
  %shift_done0 = icmp eq i64 %shift_index0, %insert_index1
  br i1 %shift_done0, label %store_current, label %shift_one

shift_one:
  %shift_source_index0 = sub i64 %shift_index0, 1
  %shift_source_offset0 = mul i64 %shift_source_index0, 24
  %shift_source_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %shift_source_offset0
  %shift_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %shift_source_ptr0
  %shift_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %shift_index0, 24
  %shift_dest_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %shift_dest_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %shift_entry0, ptr %shift_dest_ptr0
  store i64 %shift_source_index0, ptr %shift_index_slot
  br label %shift_loop

store_current:
  %insert_index2 = load i64, ptr %insert_index_slot
  %insert_offset0 = mul i64 %insert_index2, 24
  %insert_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %insert_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %current_entry0, ptr %insert_ptr0
  %out_count2 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  %new_out_count0 = add i64 %out_count2, 1
  store i64 %new_out_count0, ptr %out_count_slot
  br label %next_input

next_input:
  %input_index1 = load i64, ptr %input_index_slot
  %input_next0 = add i64 %input_index1, 1
  store i64 %input_next0, ptr %input_index_slot
  br label %process_next

done:
  %final_count0 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %final_count0, 1
  ret { ptr, i64 } %carrier1
}

define { ptr, i64 } @evid$map_from_entries_using_last_bindings$Int$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0) {
entry:
  %input_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %input_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %input_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %input_count0, 0
  br i1 %input_empty0, label %return_empty, label %allocate

return_empty:
  ret { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer

allocate:
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %input_count0, 16
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  %input_index_slot = alloca i64
  %out_count_slot = alloca i64
  %scan_index_slot = alloca i64
  %insert_index_slot = alloca i64
  %shift_index_slot = alloca i64
  store i64 0, ptr %input_index_slot
  store i64 0, ptr %out_count_slot
  br label %process_next

process_next:
  %input_index0 = load i64, ptr %input_index_slot
  %input_done0 = icmp eq i64 %input_index0, %input_count0
  br i1 %input_done0, label %done, label %load_input

load_input:
  %input_offset0 = mul i64 %input_index0, 16
  %input_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %input_data0, i64 %input_offset0
  %current_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Int__Int_, ptr %input_entry_ptr0
  %current_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Int__Int_ %current_entry0, 0
  store i64 0, ptr %scan_index_slot
  br label %scan_output

scan_output:
  %scan_index0 = load i64, ptr %scan_index_slot
  %out_count0 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  %scan_done0 = icmp eq i64 %scan_index0, %out_count0
  br i1 %scan_done0, label %insert_current, label %compare_existing

compare_existing:
  %output_offset0 = mul i64 %scan_index0, 16
  %existing_entry_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %output_offset0
  %existing_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Int__Int_, ptr %existing_entry_ptr0
  %existing_key0 = extractvalue %evid.type.MapEntry_Int__Int_ %existing_entry0, 0
  %key_equal0 = icmp eq i64 %current_key0, %existing_key0
  br i1 %key_equal0, label %duplicate_key, label %key_not_equal

key_not_equal:
  %current_key_less0 = icmp slt i64 %current_key0, %existing_key0
  br i1 %current_key_less0, label %insert_current, label %scan_next

scan_next:
  %scan_next0 = add i64 %scan_index0, 1
  store i64 %scan_next0, ptr %scan_index_slot
  br label %scan_output

duplicate_key:
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Int__Int_ %current_entry0, ptr %existing_entry_ptr0
  br label %next_input

insert_current:
  %insert_index0 = load i64, ptr %scan_index_slot
  %out_count1 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  store i64 %insert_index0, ptr %insert_index_slot
  %suffix_count0 = sub i64 %out_count1, %insert_index0
  %suffix_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %suffix_count0, 0
  br i1 %suffix_empty0, label %store_current, label %shift_setup

shift_setup:
  store i64 %out_count1, ptr %shift_index_slot
  br label %shift_loop

shift_loop:
  %shift_index0 = load i64, ptr %shift_index_slot
  %insert_index1 = load i64, ptr %insert_index_slot
  %shift_done0 = icmp eq i64 %shift_index0, %insert_index1
  br i1 %shift_done0, label %store_current, label %shift_one

shift_one:
  %shift_source_index0 = sub i64 %shift_index0, 1
  %shift_source_offset0 = mul i64 %shift_source_index0, 16
  %shift_source_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %shift_source_offset0
  %shift_entry0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Int__Int_, ptr %shift_source_ptr0
  %shift_dest_offset0 = mul i64 %shift_index0, 16
  %shift_dest_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %shift_dest_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Int__Int_ %shift_entry0, ptr %shift_dest_ptr0
  store i64 %shift_source_index0, ptr %shift_index_slot
  br label %shift_loop

store_current:
  %insert_index2 = load i64, ptr %insert_index_slot
  %insert_offset0 = mul i64 %insert_index2, 16
  %insert_ptr0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %insert_offset0
  store %evid.type.MapEntry_Int__Int_ %current_entry0, ptr %insert_ptr0
  %out_count2 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  %new_out_count0 = add i64 %out_count2, 1
  store i64 %new_out_count0, ptr %out_count_slot
  br label %next_input

next_input:
  %input_index1 = load i64, ptr %input_index_slot
  %input_next0 = add i64 %input_index1, 1
  store i64 %input_next0, ptr %input_index_slot
  br label %process_next

done:
  %final_count0 = load i64, ptr %out_count_slot
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %final_count0, 1
  ret { ptr, i64 } %carrier1
}

define %evid.yield.list_require_nonempty$MapEntry_Text__Int_ @evid$list_require_nonempty$MapEntry_Text__Int_({ ptr, i64 } %arg0) {
entry:
  %count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %is_empty0 = icmp eq i64 %count0, 0
  br i1 %is_empty0, label %empty, label %nonempty

nonempty:
  %ok.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.list_require_nonempty$MapEntry_Text__Int_ zeroinitializer, i8 0, 0
  %ok.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  store { ptr, i64 } %arg0, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %ok.pack.slot
  %ok.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.list_require_nonempty$MapEntry_Text__Int_ %ok.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %ok.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.list_require_nonempty$MapEntry_Text__Int_ %ok.value

empty:
  %reason0 = insertvalue %evid.type.ListCardinalityFailure zeroinitializer, i32 1, 0
  %fail.tag = insertvalue %evid.yield.list_require_nonempty$MapEntry_Text__Int_ zeroinitializer, i8 1, 0
  %fail.pack.slot = alloca { i64, [8 x i8] }
  store { i64, [8 x i8] } zeroinitializer, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  store %evid.type.ListCardinalityFailure %reason0, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.pack = load { i64, [8 x i8] }, ptr %fail.pack.slot
  %fail.value = insertvalue %evid.yield.list_require_nonempty$MapEntry_Text__Int_ %fail.tag, { i64, [8 x i8] } %fail.pack, 2
  ret %evid.yield.list_require_nonempty$MapEntry_Text__Int_ %fail.value
}

define %evid.type.ListFirstAndRest_MapEntry_Text__Int__ @evid$nonempty_list_consume_first$MapEntry_Text__Int_({ ptr, i64 } %arg0) {
entry:
  %data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %first0 = load %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_, ptr %data0
  %rest_count0 = sub i64 %count0, 1
  %rest_data0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 24
  %rest0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %rest_data0, 0
  %rest1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %rest0, i64 %rest_count0, 1
  %result0 = insertvalue %evid.type.ListFirstAndRest_MapEntry_Text__Int__ zeroinitializer, %evid.type.MapEntry_Text__Int_ %first0, 0
  %result1 = insertvalue %evid.type.ListFirstAndRest_MapEntry_Text__Int__ %result0, { ptr, i64 } %rest1, 1
  ret %evid.type.ListFirstAndRest_MapEntry_Text__Int__ %result1
}

define { ptr, i64 } @evid$nonempty_list_concat$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0, { ptr, i64 } %arg1) {
entry:
  %left_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %left_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %right_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %right_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 1
  %new_count0 = add i64 %left_count0, %right_count0
  %left_bytes0 = mul i64 %left_count0, 8
  %right_bytes0 = mul i64 %right_count0, 8
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %new_count0, 8
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %data0, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_bytes0, i1 false)
  %right_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %left_bytes0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %right_dest0, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_bytes0, i1 false)
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %new_count0, 1
  ret { ptr, i64 } %carrier1
}

entry:
  %left_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %left_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %right_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %right_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 1
  %new_count0 = add i64 %left_count0, %right_count0
  %left_bytes0 = mul i64 %left_count0, 8
  %right_bytes0 = mul i64 %right_count0, 8
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %new_count0, 8
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %data0, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_bytes0, i1 false)
  %right_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %left_bytes0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %right_dest0, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_bytes0, i1 false)
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %new_count0, 1

  %right_bytes0 = mul i64 %right_count0, 8
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %new_count0, 8

define %evid.type.ListFirstAndRest_Int_ @evid$nonempty_list_consume_first$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0) {
entry:
  %data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %first0 = load i64, ptr %data0
  %rest_count0 = sub i64 %count0, 1
  %rest_data0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 8
  %rest0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %rest_data0, 0
  %rest1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %rest0, i64 %rest_count0, 1
  %result0 = insertvalue %evid.type.ListFirstAndRest_Int_ zeroinitializer, i64 %first0, 0
  %result1 = insertvalue %evid.type.ListFirstAndRest_Int_ %result0, { ptr, i64 } %rest1, 1
  ret %evid.type.ListFirstAndRest_Int_ %result1
}

define { ptr, i64 } @evid$list_concat$Int({ ptr, i64 } %arg0, { ptr, i64 } %arg1) {
entry:
  %left_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 0
  %left_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg0, 1
  %right_data0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 0
  %right_count0 = extractvalue { ptr, i64 } %arg1, 1
  %new_count0 = add i64 %left_count0, %right_count0
  %left_bytes0 = mul i64 %left_count0, 8
  %right_bytes0 = mul i64 %right_count0, 8
  %alloc_bytes0 = mul i64 %new_count0, 8
  %data0 = call ptr @malloc(i64 %alloc_bytes0)
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %data0, ptr %left_data0, i64 %left_bytes0, i1 false)
  %right_dest0 = getelementptr i8, ptr %data0, i64 %left_bytes0
  call void @llvm.memcpy.p0.p0.i64(ptr %right_dest0, ptr %right_data0, i64 %right_bytes0, i1 false)
  %carrier0 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } zeroinitializer, ptr %data0, 0
  %carrier1 = insertvalue { ptr, i64 } %carrier0, i64 %new_count0, 1
  ret { ptr, i64 } %carrier1
}
